```go
package tui

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"strings"

	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"

	"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/i18n"
)

// localeSettingsModel is a two-row chooser for the user's UI locale.
// Reached from the "個人設定 / User settings" sub-menu. Mirrors
// notifySettingsModel's commit discipline: cursor moves are free, the
// chosen locale is staged in `selected` and only committed to the DB
// on Ctrl+S. Esc discards.
//
// Not a textinput form, so h/l navigation can be bound (left = back,
// right = pick the cursored option). Not added to isFormScreen so '?'
// still pops the help overlay on this screen.
type localeSettingsModel struct {
	deps     Deps
	options  []i18n.Locale
	cursor   int           // index into options, currently highlighted row
	current  i18n.Locale   // what's persisted in deps.User.Locale right now
	selected i18n.Locale   // what Ctrl+S would persist; equal to current until the user picks something else
	flash    string
	err      string
}

func newLocaleSettingsModel(deps Deps) localeSettingsModel {
	current := localeOf(deps)
	options := []i18n.Locale{i18n.LocaleZHTW, i18n.LocaleEN}
	cursor := 0
	for i, o := range options {
		if o == current {
			cursor = i
			break
		}
	}
	return localeSettingsModel{
		deps:     deps,
		options:  options,
		cursor:   cursor,
		current:  current,
		selected: current,
	}
}

func (m localeSettingsModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }

func (m localeSettingsModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
	if k, ok := msg.(tea.KeyMsg); ok {
		switch k.String() {
		case "esc", "q", "left", "h", "backspace":
			return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenUserSettings} }
		case "Q":
			return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
		case "up", "k":
			if m.cursor > 0 {
				m.cursor--
			}
			return m, nil
		case "down", "j":
			if m.cursor < len(m.options)-1 {
				m.cursor++
			}
			return m, nil
		case "enter", " ", "right", "l":
			m.selected = m.options[m.cursor]
			m.flash = ""
			m.err = ""
			return m, nil
		case "ctrl+s":
			return m.save()
		case "1", "2":
			idx := int(k.String()[0] - '1')
			if idx < len(m.options) {
				m.cursor = idx
				m.selected = m.options[idx]
				m.flash = ""
				m.err = ""
			}
			return m, nil
		}
	}
	return m, nil
}

func (m localeSettingsModel) save() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
	if m.deps.User == nil {
		m.err = "internal error: no user"
		return m, nil
	}
	if !i18n.Valid(string(m.selected)) {
		m.err = fmt.Sprintf("invalid locale %q", m.selected)
		return m, nil
	}
	if m.selected == m.current {
		// Nothing to do; surface a quiet flash so the keystroke still has
		// visible effect.
		loc := localeOf(m.deps)
		m.flash = i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsFlashSaved)
		return m, nil
	}
	ctx := context.Background()
	if err := m.deps.Store.Users().SetLocale(ctx, m.deps.User.ID, string(m.selected)); err != nil {
		m.err = err.Error()
		return m, nil
	}
	// Refresh User in place so every other screen sharing this Deps
	// pointer renders in the new locale on the next navigate. Mirrors
	// screen_bio_edit.submit().
	if fresh, err := m.deps.Store.Users().GetByID(ctx, m.deps.User.ID); err == nil {
		*m.deps.User = *fresh
	}
	m.current = m.selected
	loc := localeOf(m.deps)
	m.flash = i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsFlashSaved)
	m.err = ""
	return m, nil
}

func (m localeSettingsModel) View() string {
	loc := localeOf(m.deps)
	var b strings.Builder
	b.WriteString("\n")
	b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsTitle)))
	b.WriteString("\n\n")

	b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsIntro)))
	b.WriteString("\n\n")

	for i, o := range m.options {
		marker := "  "
		dot := "[ ]"
		if o == m.selected {
			dot = "[•]"
		}
		var label string
		switch o {
		case i18n.LocaleZHTW:
			label = i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsOptionZH)
		case i18n.LocaleEN:
			label = i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsOptionEN)
		default:
			label = string(o)
		}
		row := fmt.Sprintf("  %d. %s %s", i+1, dot, label)
		if i == m.cursor {
			marker = "▸ "
			row = StyleHighlight.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" %d. %s %-32s ", i+1, dot, label))
		}
		b.WriteString(marker + row + "\n")
	}

	if m.selected != m.current {
		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleDim.Render(i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsDirty)))
	}
	b.WriteString("\n\n  " + StyleDim.Render(i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsNoteGlyphs)))

	if m.err != "" {
		b.WriteString("\n\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err))
	}
	if m.flash != "" {
		b.WriteString("\n\n  " + StyleSuccess.Render(m.flash))
	}

	b.WriteString("\n\n  " + StyleHelp.Render(i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenLocaleSettingsHelpLine)))
	b.WriteString("\n")
	return b.String()
}

```

```go
package tui

import (
	"context"
	"testing"

	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"

	"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/i18n"
	"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store/storetest"
)

func newLocaleSettingsFixture(t *testing.T) (localeSettingsModel, Deps) {
	t.Helper()
	st := storetest.New(t)
	u := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
	deps := Deps{Store: st, User: u}
	return newLocaleSettingsModel(deps), deps
}

func updateLocale(m localeSettingsModel, msg tea.Msg) (localeSettingsModel, tea.Cmd) {
	model, cmd := m.Update(msg)
	return model.(localeSettingsModel), cmd
}

// Default locale is zh-TW; cursor and selected both land on the zh-TW row.
func TestLocaleSettings_InitialState(t *testing.T) {
	m, _ := newLocaleSettingsFixture(t)
	if m.current != i18n.LocaleZHTW {
		t.Errorf("current = %q, want LocaleZHTW", m.current)
	}
	if m.selected != i18n.LocaleZHTW {
		t.Errorf("selected = %q, want LocaleZHTW", m.selected)
	}
	if m.cursor != 0 {
		t.Errorf("cursor = %d, want 0", m.cursor)
	}
}

// Pressing Enter / Space / →  / l on the second row stages "en" as the
// selection but does NOT persist — that requires Ctrl+S.
func TestLocaleSettings_SelectStagesWithoutPersisting(t *testing.T) {
	for _, key := range []string{"enter", " ", "right", "l"} {
		t.Run(key, func(t *testing.T) {
			m, deps := newLocaleSettingsFixture(t)
			m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf("j")) // cursor onto en
			m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf(key))
			if m.selected != i18n.LocaleEN {
				t.Errorf("selected = %q, want LocaleEN", m.selected)
			}
			if m.current != i18n.LocaleZHTW {
				t.Errorf("current = %q, want LocaleZHTW (no save yet)", m.current)
			}
			fresh, _ := deps.Store.Users().GetByID(context.Background(), deps.User.ID)
			if fresh.Locale != "zh-TW" {
				t.Errorf("DB locale = %q, want zh-TW (no save yet)", fresh.Locale)
			}
		})
	}
}

// Numeric shortcut: '2' jumps to and stages the en row.
func TestLocaleSettings_NumericShortcut(t *testing.T) {
	m, _ := newLocaleSettingsFixture(t)
	m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf("2"))
	if m.cursor != 1 {
		t.Errorf("cursor = %d, want 1 after '2'", m.cursor)
	}
	if m.selected != i18n.LocaleEN {
		t.Errorf("selected = %q, want LocaleEN", m.selected)
	}
}

// Ctrl+S persists the staged selection AND mutates the in-memory User
// pointer in place — so the next render of any screen sharing this Deps
// sees the new locale without a re-login.
func TestLocaleSettings_SavePersistsAndRefreshesUser(t *testing.T) {
	m, deps := newLocaleSettingsFixture(t)
	m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf("j"))
	m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf("enter"))   // stage en
	m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf("ctrl+s"))  // commit

	if m.err != "" {
		t.Fatalf("save err = %q", m.err)
	}
	if m.flash == "" {
		t.Errorf("flash empty after save — want a saved-toast")
	}
	// In-place User refresh.
	if deps.User.Locale != "en" {
		t.Errorf("in-memory user locale = %q, want en", deps.User.Locale)
	}
	// DB row updated.
	fresh, _ := deps.Store.Users().GetByID(context.Background(), deps.User.ID)
	if fresh.Locale != "en" {
		t.Errorf("DB locale = %q, want en", fresh.Locale)
	}
}

// Esc returns to user-settings WITHOUT persisting a staged change.
func TestLocaleSettings_EscDiscards(t *testing.T) {
	m, deps := newLocaleSettingsFixture(t)
	m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf("j"))
	m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf("enter")) // stage en
	_, cmd := updateLocale(m, keyOf("esc"))
	nav, ok := runCmd(cmd).(NavigateMsg)
	if !ok || nav.To != ScreenUserSettings {
		t.Errorf("nav = %+v, want ScreenUserSettings", nav)
	}
	fresh, _ := deps.Store.Users().GetByID(context.Background(), deps.User.ID)
	if fresh.Locale != "zh-TW" {
		t.Errorf("DB locale = %q, want zh-TW (Esc must not persist)", fresh.Locale)
	}
}

// h / left / backspace are also "back to user-settings" (parity with
// every other vim-style nav screen in the codebase).
func TestLocaleSettings_BackKeys(t *testing.T) {
	for _, key := range []string{"h", "left", "backspace"} {
		t.Run(key, func(t *testing.T) {
			m, _ := newLocaleSettingsFixture(t)
			_, cmd := updateLocale(m, keyOf(key))
			nav, ok := runCmd(cmd).(NavigateMsg)
			if !ok || nav.To != ScreenUserSettings {
				t.Errorf("nav = %+v, want ScreenUserSettings", nav)
			}
		})
	}
}

// Q (capital) jumps straight to main menu.
func TestLocaleSettings_QuitToMainMenu(t *testing.T) {
	m, _ := newLocaleSettingsFixture(t)
	_, cmd := updateLocale(m, keyOf("Q"))
	nav, ok := runCmd(cmd).(NavigateMsg)
	if !ok || nav.To != ScreenMainMenu {
		t.Errorf("nav = %+v, want ScreenMainMenu", nav)
	}
}

// Re-saving the same locale shouldn't error and shouldn't touch the DB
// in any visible way (the row already had this value).
func TestLocaleSettings_SaveSameLocaleIsIdempotent(t *testing.T) {
	m, deps := newLocaleSettingsFixture(t)
	m, _ = updateLocale(m, keyOf("ctrl+s"))
	if m.err != "" {
		t.Fatalf("save err = %q on no-op save", m.err)
	}
	if deps.User.Locale != "zh-TW" {
		t.Errorf("user locale = %q, want unchanged zh-TW", deps.User.Locale)
	}
}

// User who already has en stored: the screen opens with cursor / current
// / selected all landed on the en row so j/k navigation is symmetric.
func TestLocaleSettings_PreExistingEnUser(t *testing.T) {
	st := storetest.New(t)
	u := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
	if err := st.Users().SetLocale(context.Background(), u.ID, "en"); err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("SetLocale: %v", err)
	}
	fresh, _ := st.Users().GetByID(context.Background(), u.ID)
	deps := Deps{Store: st, User: fresh}
	m := newLocaleSettingsModel(deps)
	if m.current != i18n.LocaleEN || m.selected != i18n.LocaleEN || m.cursor != 1 {
		t.Errorf("current=%q selected=%q cursor=%d; want en/en/1", m.current, m.selected, m.cursor)
	}
}
```

```bash
cat > /tmp/check_migration.go <<'EOF'
package main

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
)

func main() {
	dir, _ := os.MkdirTemp("", "sshbbs-test-*")
	defer os.RemoveAll(dir)
	st, err := store.Open(filepath.Join(dir, "test.db"))
	if err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Open: %v\n", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}
	defer st.Close()

	u, err := st.Users().Create(context.Background(), "alice", "$2a$12$placeholderplaceholderplaceholderplaceholderplaceholder.", "Alice", "")
	if err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Create: %v\n", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}
	fmt.Printf("created user id=%d locale=%q\n", u.ID, u.Locale)
	if err := st.Users().SetLocale(context.Background(), u.ID, "en"); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "SetLocale: %v\n", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}
	fresh, _ := st.Users().GetByID(context.Background(), u.ID)
	fmt.Printf("after SetLocale(en) locale=%q\n", fresh.Locale)

	// Verify schema directly.
	db, _ := sql.Open("sqlite", filepath.Join(dir, "test.db"))
	defer db.Close()
	rows, _ := db.QueryContext(context.Background(), "SELECT version FROM schema_migrations ORDER BY version")
	defer rows.Close()
	var versions []int
	for rows.Next() {
		var v int
		rows.Scan(&v)
		versions = append(versions, v)
	}
	fmt.Printf("applied migrations: %v\n", versions)
}
EOF
go run /tmp/check_migration.go 2>&1
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./internal/tui/screen_online.go`

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"fmt"
5		"sort"
6		"strings"
7	
8		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
9	
10		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/chat"
11	)
12	
13	type onlineModel struct {
14		deps    Deps
15		users   []chat.OnlineUser
16		cursor  int
17		width   int
18		height  int
19	}
20	
21	func newOnlineModel(deps Deps) onlineModel {
22		var list []chat.OnlineUser
23		if deps.Broker != nil {
24			list = deps.Broker.OnlineList()
25		}
26		// Stable order: by user_id ascending so the same login is in the same
27		// row each time the screen is opened. The broker's map iteration is
28		// otherwise non-deterministic.
29		sort.Slice(list, func(i, j int) bool { return list[i].UserID < list[j].UserID })
30		return onlineModel{deps: deps, users: list}
31	}
32	
33	func (m onlineModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
34	
35	func (m onlineModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
36		switch msg := msg.(type) {
37		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
38			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
39			return m, nil
40		case tea.KeyMsg:
41			switch msg.String() {
42			case "esc", "backspace", "left", "h", "Q":
43				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
44			case "up", "k", "[":
45				if m.cursor > 0 {
46					m.cursor--
47				}
48			case "down", "j", "]":
49				if m.cursor < len(m.users)-1 {
50					m.cursor++
51				}
52			case "home", "g":
53				m.cursor = 0
54			case "end", "G":
55				if len(m.users) > 0 {
56					m.cursor = len(m.users) - 1
57				}
58			case "enter", " ", "right", "l":
59				if len(m.users) == 0 {
60					return m, nil
61				}
62				u := m.users[m.cursor]
63				return m, func() tea.Msg {
64					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenWBCompose, Recipient: u.UserIDStr}
65				}
66			case "t":
67				// Open the 1-to-1 conversation thread with the cursored user.
68				// Compose stays on Enter; t is the chat-style entry point.
69				if len(m.users) == 0 {
70					return m, nil
71				}
72				u := m.users[m.cursor]
73				return m, func() tea.Msg {
74					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenWBThread, CounterpartyUserID: u.UserID}
75				}
76			}
77		}
78		return m, nil
79	}
80	
81	func (m onlineModel) View() string {
82		var b strings.Builder
83		b.WriteString("\n")
84		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" 線上使用者 Online (%d) ", len(m.users))))
85		b.WriteString("\n\n")
86	
87		if len(m.users) == 0 {
88			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("(nobody else online)") + "\n")
89			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("Esc/←/h back · Q quit to menu"))
90			return b.String()
91		}
92	
93		const (
94			userW = 14
95			sessW = 10
96		)
97		header := fmt.Sprintf("  %s  %s",
98			PadRight("UserID", userW),
99			PadRight("Sessions", sessW),
100		)
101		b.WriteString(StyleDim.Render(header) + "\n")
102	
103		for i, u := range m.users {
104			row := fmt.Sprintf("  %s  %s",
105				PadRight(u.UserIDStr, userW),
106				PadRight(fmt.Sprintf("%d", u.Sessions), sessW),
107			)
108			if i == m.cursor {
109				b.WriteString(StyleHighlight.Render("▸"+row[1:]) + "\n")
110			} else {
111				b.WriteString(" " + row + "\n")
112			}
113		}
114	
115		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("↑/↓ j/k move · Enter/→/l 丟水球 · t 對話 thread · Esc/←/h back · Q quit"))
116		b.WriteString("\n")
117		return b.String()
118	}
119
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./internal/tui/screen_board_list.go`

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"strings"
7	
8		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
9		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
10	
11		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
12	)
13	
14	type boardListModel struct {
15		deps         Deps
16		boards       []*store.Board // canonical full list from the store
17		filtered     []*store.Board // boards visible after applying m.filter
18		cursor       int            // index into filtered
19		width        int
20		height       int
21		loadErr      error
22		search       textinput.Model // input for the active search term
23		searchActive bool            // true while focused & accepting keys
24		filter       string          // confirmed (non-empty) substring; "" = no filter
25	}
26	
27	func newBoardListModel(deps Deps) boardListModel {
28		boards, err := deps.Store.Boards().List(context.Background())
29		ti := textinput.New()
30		ti.Placeholder = "搜尋看板 / search boards"
31		ti.CharLimit = 32
32		ti.Width = 40
33		m := boardListModel{deps: deps, boards: boards, loadErr: err, search: ti}
34		m.recomputeFilter()
35		return m
36	}
37	
38	func (m boardListModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
39	
40	// recomputeFilter rebuilds m.filtered from m.boards using the current
41	// m.filter (case-insensitive substring against name/title/description) and
42	// clamps the cursor so it never points past the end of the new slice.
43	// strings.ToLower is a no-op for CJK runes, which still match by byte
44	// substring — fine for the boards we ship today.
45	func (m *boardListModel) recomputeFilter() {
46		if m.filter == "" {
47			m.filtered = m.boards
48		} else {
49			lq := strings.ToLower(m.filter)
50			out := make([]*store.Board, 0, len(m.boards))
51			for _, b := range m.boards {
52				if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(b.Name), lq) ||
53					strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(b.Title), lq) ||
54					strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(b.Description), lq) {
55					out = append(out, b)
56				}
57			}
58			m.filtered = out
59		}
60		if m.cursor >= len(m.filtered) {
61			m.cursor = max(0, len(m.filtered)-1)
62		}
63	}
64	
65	func (m boardListModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
66		switch msg := msg.(type) {
67		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
68			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
69			m.search.Width = max(20, msg.Width-12)
70			return m, nil
71		case tea.KeyMsg:
72			// While the search input is focused every printable key types into
73			// it; only enter (confirm), esc (cancel), and ctrl+c (handled at
74			// Root) escape that. This mirrors the form-screen rule from
75			// CLAUDE.md so vim navigation keys (h/j/k/l) and action keys (Q)
76			// remain available as text characters.
77			if m.searchActive {
78				switch msg.String() {
79				case "enter":
80					m.filter = strings.TrimSpace(m.search.Value())
81					m.searchActive = false
82					m.search.Blur()
83					m.cursor = 0
84					m.recomputeFilter()
85					return m, nil
86				case "esc":
87					// Drop the in-flight value AND any prior confirmed filter.
88					m.search.SetValue("")
89					m.filter = ""
90					m.searchActive = false
91					m.search.Blur()
92					m.cursor = 0
93					m.recomputeFilter()
94					return m, nil
95				}
96				var cmd tea.Cmd
97				m.search, cmd = m.search.Update(msg)
98				return m, cmd
99			}
100	
101			switch msg.String() {
102			case "/":
103				m.searchActive = true
104				m.search.SetValue(m.filter)
105				m.search.CursorEnd()
106				m.search.Focus()
107				return m, textinput.Blink
108			case "esc":
109				// While idle, esc clears an active filter first; otherwise it
110				// returns to the main menu (matches existing back-navigation).
111				if m.filter != "" {
112					m.filter = ""
113					m.search.SetValue("")
114					m.cursor = 0
115					m.recomputeFilter()
116					return m, nil
117				}
118				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
119			case "backspace", "left", "h":
120				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
121			case "Q":
122				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
123			case "up", "k", "[":
124				if m.cursor > 0 {
125					m.cursor--
126				}
127			case "down", "j", "]":
128				if m.cursor < len(m.filtered)-1 {
129					m.cursor++
130				}
131			case "home", "g":
132				m.cursor = 0
133			case "end", "G":
134				if len(m.filtered) > 0 {
135					m.cursor = len(m.filtered) - 1
136				}
137			case "enter", " ", "right", "l":
138				if len(m.filtered) == 0 {
139					return m, nil
140				}
141				b := m.filtered[m.cursor]
142				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: b.ID} }
143			}
144		}
145		return m, nil
146	}
147	
148	func (m boardListModel) View() string {
149		var b strings.Builder
150		b.WriteString("\n")
151		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 看板列表 Boards "))
152		b.WriteString("\n\n")
153	
154		if m.loadErr != nil {
155			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ load failed: "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
156			return b.String()
157		}
158	
159		// Search row: live input above the list while focused; passive
160		// "[搜尋: foo · N 筆 …]" indicator when a confirmed filter is active.
161		switch {
162		case m.searchActive:
163			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("搜尋 / : ") + m.search.View() + "\n")
164			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("(%d 筆符合 · Enter 套用 · Esc 取消)", len(m.filtered))) + "\n\n")
165		case m.filter != "":
166			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("[搜尋: %s · %d 筆 · / 修改 · Esc 清除]", m.filter, len(m.filtered))) + "\n\n")
167		}
168	
169		if len(m.filtered) == 0 {
170			if m.filter != "" {
171				b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("(沒有符合的看板)") + "\n")
172			} else {
173				b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("(no boards yet)") + "\n")
174			}
175			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render(boardListFooter()) + "\n")
176			return b.String()
177		}
178	
179		const (
180			nameW  = 14
181			titleW = 32
182		)
183		header := fmt.Sprintf("  %s  %s  %s",
184			PadRight("Name", nameW),
185			PadRight("Title", titleW),
186			"Description",
187		)
188		b.WriteString(StyleDim.Render(header) + "\n")
189	
190		for i, br := range m.filtered {
191			row := fmt.Sprintf("  %s  %s  %s",
192				PadRight(br.Name, nameW),
193				PadRight(br.Title, titleW),
194				Truncate(br.Description, max(20, m.width-nameW-titleW-8)),
195			)
196			if i == m.cursor {
197				b.WriteString(StyleHighlight.Render("▸"+row[1:]) + "\n")
198			} else {
199				b.WriteString(" " + row + "\n")
200			}
201		}
202	
203		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render(boardListFooter()))
204		b.WriteString("\n")
205		return b.String()
206	}
207	
208	func boardListFooter() string {
209		return "↑/↓ j/k move · Enter/→/l open · / search · ? help · Esc/←/h back · Ctrl+C disconnect"
210	}
211
```

 `./internal/tui/screen_user_settings.go`

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"fmt"
5		"strings"
6	
7		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
8	
9		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/i18n"
10	)
11	
12	// userSettingsModel is the "個人設定" sub-menu reached from the main menu.
13	// Three entries: change password, edit bio, edit notification settings.
14	// Layout and key handling mirror mainMenuModel deliberately so muscle memory
15	// transfers across BBS-internal menus.
16	type userSettingsModel struct {
17		deps   Deps
18		items  []menuItem
19		cursor int
20	}
21	
22	func newUserSettingsModel(deps Deps) userSettingsModel {
23		loc := localeOf(deps)
24		items := []menuItem{
25			{label: "修改密碼 Change password", hint: "current → new → confirm", to: ScreenPasswordChange},
26			{label: "修改 Bio Edit bio", hint: "free-form profile blurb", to: ScreenBioEdit},
27			{label: i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenUserSettingsLocale), hint: i18n.T(loc, i18n.ScreenUserSettingsLocaleHint), to: ScreenLocaleSettings},
28			{label: "通知設定 Notification settings", hint: "webhook targets + per-event toggles", to: ScreenNotifySettings},
29			{label: "返回 Back", hint: "main menu", to: ScreenMainMenu},
30		}
31		return userSettingsModel{deps: deps, items: items}
32	}
33	
34	func (m userSettingsModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
35	
36	func (m userSettingsModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
37		if k, ok := msg.(tea.KeyMsg); ok {
38			switch k.String() {
39			case "esc", "q", "left", "h", "backspace":
40				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
41			case "Q":
42				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
43			case "up", "k":
44				if m.cursor > 0 {
45					m.cursor--
46				}
47				return m, nil
48			case "down", "j":
49				if m.cursor < len(m.items)-1 {
50					m.cursor++
51				}
52				return m, nil
53			case "enter", " ", "right", "l":
54				it := m.items[m.cursor]
55				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: it.to} }
56			case "1", "2", "3", "4", "5":
57				idx := int(k.String()[0] - '1')
58				if idx < len(m.items) {
59					it := m.items[idx]
60					return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: it.to} }
61				}
62			}
63		}
64		return m, nil
65	}
66	
67	func (m userSettingsModel) View() string {
68		u := m.deps.User
69		var b strings.Builder
70		b.WriteString("\n")
71		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 個人設定 User Settings "))
72		b.WriteString("\n\n")
73	
74		if u != nil {
75			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("帳號 %s · 角色 %s", u.UserID, u.Role)))
76			b.WriteString("\n")
77			bio := strings.TrimSpace(u.Bio)
78			if bio == "" {
79				b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("(尚未填寫 bio)"))
80			} else {
81				// Show only the first line of bio in the header so the menu
82				// itself stays compact; the bio-edit screen owns the full view.
83				firstLine := bio
84				if i := strings.IndexByte(firstLine, '\n'); i >= 0 {
85					firstLine = firstLine[:i]
86				}
87				b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Bio: ") + Truncate(firstLine, 60))
88			}
89			b.WriteString("\n\n")
90		}
91	
92		for i, it := range m.items {
93			marker := "  "
94			row := fmt.Sprintf("  %d. %s", i+1, it.label)
95			if i == m.cursor {
96				marker = "▸ "
97				row = StyleHighlight.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" %d. %-40s ", i+1, it.label))
98			}
99			b.WriteString(marker + row)
100			if it.hint != "" {
101				b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(it.hint))
102			}
103			b.WriteString("\n")
104		}
105	
106		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("↑/↓ j/k move · Enter/→/l choose · 1-5 jump · Esc/←/h back"))
107		b.WriteString("\n")
108		return b.String()
109	}
110
```

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"testing"
5	
6		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
7	
8		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/chat"

10		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store/storetest"
11	)
12	
13	// nullSender is a chat.Sender that swallows messages — sufficient for the
14	// online screen which only reads OnlineList(), never Sends.
15	type nullSender struct{}
16	
17	func (nullSender) Send(tea.Msg) {}
18	
19	func newOnlineFixture(t *testing.T, registered ...string) onlineModel {
20		t.Helper()
21		st := storetest.New(t)
22		user := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
23		br := chat.NewBroker()
24		for i, name := range registered {
25			br.Register(&chat.Session{
26				UserID:    int64(i + 1),
27				UserIDStr: name,
28				Program:   nullSender{},
29			})
30		}
31		deps := Deps{Store: st, User: user, Broker: br}
32		return newOnlineModel(deps)
33	}
34	
35	func TestOnline_EmptyList(t *testing.T) {
36		m := newOnlineFixture(t)
37		if len(m.users) != 0 {
38			t.Errorf("got %d users, want 0", len(m.users))
39		}
40		out := m.View()
41		if !contains(out, "nobody else online") {
42			t.Errorf("View missing empty-state hint, got: %q", out)
43		}
44	}
45	
46	func TestOnline_RendersRegisteredUsers(t *testing.T) {
47		m := newOnlineFixture(t, "alice", "bob")
48		if len(m.users) != 2 {
49			t.Fatalf("got %d users, want 2", len(m.users))
50		}
51		out := m.View()
52		for _, want := range []string{"alice", "bob", "線上使用者"} {
53			if !contains(out, want) {
54				t.Errorf("View missing %q", want)
55			}
56		}
57	}
58	
59	func TestOnline_BackKeys(t *testing.T) {
60		for _, key := range []string{"esc", "backspace", "left", "h", "Q"} {
61			t.Run(key, func(t *testing.T) {
62				m := newOnlineFixture(t, "alice")
63				_, cmd := m.Update(keyOf(key))
64				nav, ok := runCmd(cmd).(NavigateMsg)
65				if !ok {
66					t.Fatalf("want NavigateMsg")
67				}
68				if nav.To != ScreenMainMenu {
69					t.Errorf("To = %v, want ScreenMainMenu", nav.To)
70				}
71			})
72		}
73	}
74	
75	func TestOnline_BracketCursorAliases(t *testing.T) {
76		m := newOnlineFixture(t, "alice", "bob")
77		model, _ := m.Update(keyOf("]"))
78		m = model.(onlineModel)
79		if m.cursor != 1 {
80			t.Errorf("after ]: cursor = %d, want 1", m.cursor)
81		}
82		model, _ = m.Update(keyOf("["))
83		m = model.(onlineModel)
84		if m.cursor != 0 {
85			t.Errorf("after [: cursor = %d, want 0", m.cursor)
86		}
87	}
88	
89	// Forward keys (enter / space / right / l) open WB compose with the
90	// cursored user pre-filled as recipient.
91	func TestOnline_ForwardKeysOpenWBCompose(t *testing.T) {
92		for _, key := range []string{"enter", " ", "right", "l"} {
93			t.Run(key, func(t *testing.T) {
94				m := newOnlineFixture(t, "alice", "bob")
95				// Move cursor to bob.
96				model, _ := m.Update(keyOf("j"))
97				m = model.(onlineModel)
98				_, cmd := m.Update(keyOf(key))
99				nav, ok := runCmd(cmd).(NavigateMsg)
100				if !ok {
101					t.Fatalf("want NavigateMsg")
102				}
103				if nav.To != ScreenWBCompose {
104					t.Errorf("To = %v, want ScreenWBCompose", nav.To)
105				}
106				if nav.Recipient != "bob" {
107					t.Errorf("Recipient = %q, want bob", nav.Recipient)
108				}
109			})
110		}
111	}
112	
113	// On an empty list, the forward keys must be no-ops (don't index out of range).
114	func TestOnline_ForwardKeysNoopWhenEmpty(t *testing.T) {
115		m := newOnlineFixture(t)
116		_, cmd := m.Update(keyOf("enter"))
117		if runCmd(cmd) != nil {
118			t.Errorf("enter on empty list should be no-op")
119		}
120	}
121	
122	// 't' opens a 1-to-1 thread with the cursored user (chat-style entry point,

124	func TestOnline_TKeyOpensThread(t *testing.T) {
125		m := newOnlineFixture(t, "alice", "bob")

137		// In the fixture, bob is the second registered user → UserID=2.

140		}
141	}
142	
143	func TestOnline_TKeyNoopWhenEmpty(t *testing.T) {
144		m := newOnlineFixture(t)
145		_, cmd := m.Update(keyOf("t"))
146		if runCmd(cmd) != nil {
147			t.Errorf("t on empty list should be no-op")

149	}
```

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"strings"
7	
8		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
9		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
10	
11		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/auth"
12	)
13	
14	const (
15		regFieldUserID = iota
16		regFieldPassword
17		regFieldNickname
18		regFieldEmail
19		regFieldCount
20	)
21	
22	type registerModel struct {
23		deps    Deps
24		inputs  []textinput.Model
25		focus   int
26		err     string
27		success bool
28		done    string // success: registered userid
29	}
30	
31	func newRegisterModel(deps Deps) registerModel {
32		inputs := make([]textinput.Model, regFieldCount)
33	
34		inputs[regFieldUserID] = textinput.New()
35		inputs[regFieldUserID].Placeholder = "alice"
36		inputs[regFieldUserID].CharLimit = 12
37		inputs[regFieldUserID].Width = 32
38		inputs[regFieldUserID].Focus()
39	
40		inputs[regFieldPassword] = textinput.New()
41		inputs[regFieldPassword].Placeholder = "≥ 6 characters"
42		inputs[regFieldPassword].EchoMode = textinput.EchoPassword
43		inputs[regFieldPassword].EchoCharacter = '•'
44		inputs[regFieldPassword].CharLimit = 128
45		inputs[regFieldPassword].Width = 32
46	
47		inputs[regFieldNickname] = textinput.New()
48		inputs[regFieldNickname].Placeholder = "愛麗絲"
49		inputs[regFieldNickname].CharLimit = 64
50		inputs[regFieldNickname].Width = 40
51	
52		inputs[regFieldEmail] = textinput.New()
53		inputs[regFieldEmail].Placeholder = "alice@example.com"
54		inputs[regFieldEmail].CharLimit = 128
55		inputs[regFieldEmail].Width = 40
56	
57		return registerModel{deps: deps, inputs: inputs}
58	}
59	
60	func (m registerModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return textinput.Blink }
61	
62	func (m registerModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
63		switch msg := msg.(type) {
64		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
65			return m, nil
66	
67		case tea.KeyMsg:
68			if m.success {
69				return m, tea.Quit
70			}
71			switch msg.String() {
72			case "esc":
73				return m, tea.Quit
74			case "tab", "down":
75				m.advance(+1)
76				return m, nil
77			case "shift+tab", "up":
78				m.advance(-1)
79				return m, nil
80			case "enter":
81				if m.focus < len(m.inputs)-1 {
82					m.advance(+1)
83					return m, nil
84				}
85				return m.submit()
86			}
87		}
88	
89		var cmd tea.Cmd
90		m.inputs[m.focus], cmd = m.inputs[m.focus].Update(msg)
91		return m, cmd
92	}
93	
94	func (m *registerModel) advance(d int) {
95		n := len(m.inputs)
96		m.focus = (m.focus + d + n) % n
97		for i := range m.inputs {
98			if i == m.focus {
99				m.inputs[i].Focus()
100			} else {
101				m.inputs[i].Blur()
102			}
103		}
104	}
105	
106	func (m registerModel) submit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
107		user, err := auth.Register(context.Background(), m.deps.Store,
108			m.inputs[regFieldUserID].Value(),
109			m.inputs[regFieldPassword].Value(),
110			m.inputs[regFieldNickname].Value(),
111			m.inputs[regFieldEmail].Value(),
112		)
113		if err != nil {
114			m.err = err.Error()
115			return m, nil
116		}
117		m.success = true
118		m.done = user.UserID
119		return m, nil
120	}
121	
122	func (m registerModel) View() string {
123		if m.success {
124			return StyleSuccess.Render("\n  ✓ 註冊成功！") +
125				"\n\n  請重新連線：\n\n    " +
126				StyleHighlight.Render(fmt.Sprintf("ssh %s@<host> -p <port>", m.done)) +
127				"\n\n  按任意鍵結束。\n"
128		}
129	
130		var b strings.Builder
131		b.WriteString("\n")
132		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render("  === 註冊新帳號 ==="))
133		b.WriteString("\n\n")
134	
135		labels := []string{
136			"帳號 user id (3-12, 字母開頭, 英數+底線)",
137			"密碼 password (≥ 6)",
138			"暱稱 nickname",
139			"Email (optional)",
140		}
141		for i, label := range labels {
142			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(label))
143			b.WriteString("\n  ")
144			b.WriteString(m.inputs[i].View())
145			b.WriteString("\n\n")
146		}
147	
148		if m.err != "" {
149			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err) + "\n\n")
150		}
151		b.WriteString("  " + StyleHelp.Render("Tab/↓ next · Shift+Tab/↑ prev · Enter submit · Esc/Ctrl+C cancel") + "\n")
152		return b.String()
153	}
154
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./internal/tui/screen_password_change.go`

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"strings"
6	
7		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
8		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
9	
10		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/auth"
11	)
12	
13	// Form-style screen reachable in two modes:
14	//
15	//   - Forced rotation: routed from Root when deps.MustChangePassword is set.
16	//     Esc disconnects (re-login lands on the same screen).
17	//   - Voluntary change: navigated from the user-settings menu. Esc returns
18	//     to the menu instead of quitting.
19	//
20	// Like screen_register, it deliberately does NOT bind h/l so those keys
21	// remain available for text editing inside the password fields.
22	
23	const (
24		pwFieldCurrent = iota
25		pwFieldNew
26		pwFieldConfirm
27		pwFieldCount
28	)
29	
30	type passwordChangeModel struct {
31		deps    Deps
32		inputs  []textinput.Model
33		focus   int
34		err     string
35		success bool
36	}
37	
38	func newPasswordChangeModel(deps Deps) passwordChangeModel {
39		inputs := make([]textinput.Model, pwFieldCount)
40		for i := range inputs {
41			ti := textinput.New()
42			ti.EchoMode = textinput.EchoPassword
43			ti.EchoCharacter = '•'
44			ti.CharLimit = 128
45			ti.Width = 32
46			inputs[i] = ti
47		}
48		inputs[pwFieldCurrent].Placeholder = "目前密碼"
49		inputs[pwFieldNew].Placeholder = "新密碼 (≥ 6)"
50		inputs[pwFieldConfirm].Placeholder = "再次輸入新密碼"
51		inputs[pwFieldCurrent].Focus()
52		return passwordChangeModel{deps: deps, inputs: inputs}
53	}
54	
55	func (m passwordChangeModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return textinput.Blink }
56	
57	func (m passwordChangeModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
58		switch msg := msg.(type) {
59		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
60			return m, nil
61	
62		case tea.KeyMsg:
63			if m.success {
64				// Voluntary change → back to the settings menu so the user
65				// can carry on tweaking other things. Forced rotation → main
66				// menu (the entry point post-rotation).
67				to := ScreenMainMenu
68				if !m.deps.MustChangePassword {
69					to = ScreenUserSettings
70				}
71				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: to} }
72			}
73			switch msg.String() {
74			case "esc":
75				// Voluntary mode (entered via 個人設定): Esc returns to the
76				// settings menu. Forced-rotation mode: Esc disconnects — the
77				// must_change flag is still set, so reconnecting just lands
78				// back on this screen. Cleaner than letting the user limbo on
79				// a screen they refused.
80				if !m.deps.MustChangePassword {
81					return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenUserSettings} }
82				}
83				return m, tea.Quit
84			case "tab", "down":
85				m.advance(+1)
86				return m, nil
87			case "shift+tab", "up":
88				m.advance(-1)
89				return m, nil
90			case "enter":
91				if m.focus < len(m.inputs)-1 {
92					m.advance(+1)
93					return m, nil
94				}
95				return m.submit()
96			}
97		}
98	
99		var cmd tea.Cmd
100		m.inputs[m.focus], cmd = m.inputs[m.focus].Update(msg)
101		return m, cmd
102	}
103	
104	func (m *passwordChangeModel) advance(d int) {
105		n := len(m.inputs)
106		m.focus = (m.focus + d + n) % n
107		for i := range m.inputs {
108			if i == m.focus {
109				m.inputs[i].Focus()
110			} else {
111				m.inputs[i].Blur()
112			}
113		}
114	}
115	
116	func (m passwordChangeModel) submit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
117		current := m.inputs[pwFieldCurrent].Value()
118		newPw := m.inputs[pwFieldNew].Value()
119		confirm := m.inputs[pwFieldConfirm].Value()
120	
121		if m.deps.User == nil {
122			m.err = "internal error: no user"
123			return m, nil
124		}
125		if err := auth.VerifyPasswordHash(m.deps.User.PasswordHash, current); err != nil {
126			m.err = "目前密碼錯誤"
127			return m, nil
128		}
129		if err := auth.ValidatePassword(newPw); err != nil {
130			m.err = err.Error()
131			return m, nil
132		}
133		if newPw != confirm {
134			m.err = "新密碼與確認不一致"
135			return m, nil
136		}
137		if newPw == current {
138			m.err = "新密碼不可與目前密碼相同"
139			return m, nil
140		}
141	
142		hash, err := auth.HashPassword(newPw)
143		if err != nil {
144			m.err = err.Error()
145			return m, nil
146		}
147		ctx := context.Background()
148		if err := m.deps.Store.Users().SetPassword(ctx, m.deps.User.ID, hash); err != nil {
149			m.err = err.Error()
150			return m, nil
151		}
152		// Refresh User in place so subsequent screens see the cleared flag.
153		if fresh, err := m.deps.Store.Users().GetByID(ctx, m.deps.User.ID); err == nil {
154			*m.deps.User = *fresh
155		}
156		m.success = true
157		to := ScreenMainMenu
158		if !m.deps.MustChangePassword {
159			to = ScreenUserSettings
160		}
161		return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: to} }
162	}
163	
164	func (m passwordChangeModel) View() string {
165		var b strings.Builder
166		b.WriteString("\n")
167		if m.deps.MustChangePassword {
168			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render("  === 修改密碼 (首次登入必須修改) ==="))
169		} else {
170			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render("  === 修改密碼 Change password ==="))
171		}
172		b.WriteString("\n\n")
173	
174		labels := []string{"目前密碼 current", "新密碼 new (≥ 6)", "再次輸入 confirm"}
175		for i, label := range labels {
176			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(label))
177			b.WriteString("\n  ")
178			b.WriteString(m.inputs[i].View())
179			b.WriteString("\n\n")
180		}
181	
182		if m.err != "" {
183			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err) + "\n\n")
184		}
185		if m.success {
186			if m.deps.MustChangePassword {
187				b.WriteString("  " + StyleSuccess.Render("✓ 已更新，將進入主選單…") + "\n\n")
188			} else {
189				b.WriteString("  " + StyleSuccess.Render("✓ 已更新") + "\n\n")
190			}
191		}
192		escHint := "Esc disconnect"
193		if !m.deps.MustChangePassword {
194			escHint = "Esc back"
195		}
196		b.WriteString("  " + StyleHelp.Render("Tab/↓ next · Shift+Tab/↑ prev · Enter submit · "+escHint))
197		b.WriteString("\n")
198		return b.String()
199	}
200
```

 `./internal/tui/screen_post_compose.go`

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"strings"
7	
8		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textarea"
9		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
10		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
11	
12		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/markdown"
13		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/notify"
14		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
15	)
16	
17	const (
18		composeFocusTitle = iota
19		composeFocusBody
20	)
21	
22	type postComposeModel struct {
23		deps     Deps
24		boardID  int64
25		parentID int64 // 0 = new post; non-zero = Re: reply to that article
26		parent   *store.Article
27		title    textinput.Model
28		body     textarea.Model
29		focus    int
30		width    int
31		height   int
32		err      string
33	}
34	
35	func newPostComposeModel(deps Deps, boardID, parentID int64) postComposeModel {
36		ti := textinput.New()
37		ti.Placeholder = "標題 title"
38		ti.CharLimit = 64
39		ti.Width = 60
40		ti.Focus()
41	
42		ta := textarea.New()
43		ta.Placeholder = "內容 body…"
44		ta.CharLimit = 8000
45		ta.SetWidth(72)
46		ta.SetHeight(12)
47	
48		m := postComposeModel{
49			deps:     deps,
50			boardID:  boardID,
51			parentID: parentID,
52			title:    ti,
53			body:     ta,
54			focus:    composeFocusTitle,
55		}
56	
57		// Reply mode: pull the parent article and pre-fill the title with "Re: "
58		// (collapsing duplicates) and the body with a markdown blockquote of the
59		// parent — same shape as mail reply (see quoteForReply in screen_mail.go).
60		// Fall through to a blank compose if the parent has gone missing.
61		if parentID != 0 && deps.Store != nil {
62			if parent, err := deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(context.Background(), parentID); err == nil {
63				m.parent = parent
64				// boardID may have been passed as 0 by the caller (article-view
65				// only knows the parent ID); fill it from the parent record so
66				// the reply lands on the same board as the original.
67				if m.boardID == 0 {
68					m.boardID = parent.BoardID
69				}
70				m.title.SetValue(rePrefix(parent.Title))
71				m.body.SetValue(quoteArticleForReply(parent))
72				// Land focus on the body so the user can start typing the reply
73				// straight away — the prefilled title is usually fine as-is.
74				m.title.Blur()
75				m.body.Focus()
76				m.focus = composeFocusBody
77			}
78		}
79		return m
80	}
81	
82	// rePrefix prepends "Re: " to the parent title, collapsing existing "Re: "
83	// runs so a long thread doesn't grow "Re: Re: Re: Hi".
84	func rePrefix(title string) string {
85		t := strings.TrimSpace(title)
86		for {
87			if strings.HasPrefix(strings.ToLower(t), "re:") {
88				t = strings.TrimSpace(t[3:])
89				continue
90			}
91			break
92		}
93		return "Re: " + t
94	}
95	
96	// quoteArticleForReply renders the parent article as a markdown blockquote
97	// suitable for pre-filling a reply body. Mirrors mail's quoteForReply.
98	func quoteArticleForReply(parent *store.Article) string {
99		var b strings.Builder
100		fmt.Fprintf(&b, "> %s · %s 寫道:\n>\n",
101			parent.AuthorUserID,
102			parent.CreatedAt.Format("2006-01-02 15:04"),
103		)
104		for _, line := range strings.Split(parent.Body, "\n") {
105			b.WriteString("> ")
106			b.WriteString(line)
107			b.WriteString("\n")
108		}
109		b.WriteString("\n")
110		return b.String()
111	}
112	
113	func (m postComposeModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return textinput.Blink }
114	
115	func (m postComposeModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
116		switch msg := msg.(type) {
117		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
118			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
119			bodyW := max(40, msg.Width-8)
120			bodyH := max(8, msg.Height-12)
121			m.body.SetWidth(bodyW)
122			m.body.SetHeight(bodyH)
123			m.title.Width = max(20, msg.Width-12)
124			return m, nil
125	
126		case tea.KeyMsg:
127			switch msg.String() {
128			case "esc":
129				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: m.boardID} }
130			case "tab":
131				m.toggleFocus()
132				return m, nil
133			case "ctrl+s":
134				return m.submit()
135			case "ctrl+i":
136				m.importFromBody()
137				return m, nil
138			}
139		}
140	
141		var cmd tea.Cmd
142		if m.focus == composeFocusTitle {
143			// In title field, Enter advances to body.
144			if k, ok := msg.(tea.KeyMsg); ok && k.String() == "enter" {
145				m.toggleFocus()
146				return m, nil
147			}
148			m.title, cmd = m.title.Update(msg)
149		} else {
150			m.body, cmd = m.body.Update(msg)
151		}
152		return m, cmd
153	}
154	
155	func (m *postComposeModel) toggleFocus() {
156		if m.focus == composeFocusTitle {
157			m.focus = composeFocusBody
158			m.title.Blur()
159			m.body.Focus()
160		} else {
161			m.focus = composeFocusTitle
162			m.body.Blur()
163			m.title.Focus()
164		}
165	}
166	
167	// importFromBody parses the current body as markdown and prefills title +
168	// body from any frontmatter found. If the body has no frontmatter it's
169	// left alone (with a helpful error). Pushes in the parsed input are
170	// silently ignored — see plan: import via Ctrl+I always credits the
171	// current user as author and never restores foreign-authored pushes.
172	func (m *postComposeModel) importFromBody() {
173		raw := m.body.Value()
174		if strings.TrimSpace(raw) == "" {
175			m.err = "貼上 markdown（含 --- frontmatter ---）後再按 Ctrl+I"
176			return
177		}
178		parsed, err := markdown.Parse(raw)
179		if err != nil {
180			m.err = "parse: " + err.Error()
181			return
182		}
183		if parsed.Title == "" && parsed.Body == strings.TrimRight(raw, "\n") {
184			// Parser didn't find frontmatter — body is verbatim. Tell the
185			// user so they don't think Ctrl+I silently no-op'd.
186			m.err = "找不到 frontmatter（請貼上開頭含 --- ... --- 的 markdown）"
187			return
188		}
189		if parsed.Title != "" {
190			m.title.SetValue(parsed.Title)
191		}
192		m.body.SetValue(parsed.Body)
193		m.err = ""
194	}
195	
196	func (m postComposeModel) submit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
197		title := strings.TrimSpace(m.title.Value())
198		body := m.body.Value()
199		if title == "" {
200			m.err = "title is required"
201			return m, nil
202		}
203		if strings.TrimSpace(body) == "" {
204			m.err = "body is required"
205			return m, nil
206		}
207		ctx := context.Background()
208		u := m.deps.User
209		art, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().Create(ctx, m.boardID, u.ID, u.UserID, title, body)
210		if err != nil {
211			m.err = err.Error()
212			return m, nil
213		}
214		if err := m.deps.Store.Users().IncrementPosts(ctx, u.ID); err != nil {
215			m.err = err.Error()
216			return m, nil
217		}
218		// Broadcast to other live sessions; recipients filter by BoardID and
219		// re-fetch the canonical list (mirrors the PushAddedMsg pattern).
220		if m.deps.Broker != nil {
221			m.deps.Broker.SendToAll(u.ID, ArticleAddedMsg{
222				BoardID:      m.boardID,
223				ArticleID:    art.ID,
224				AuthorUserID: u.UserID,
225				Title:        art.Title,
226			})
227		}
228		// Reply notification: when the post is a Re: reply to someone else's
229		// article, fan out to that author's webhook targets so they hear about
230		// it even when offline. Self-reply (replying to your own article) is
231		// silenced — the user already saw their own action.
232		if m.parent != nil && m.deps.Notify != nil && m.parent.AuthorID != u.ID {
233			m.deps.Notify.Dispatch(notify.Event{
234				Kind:       notify.KindReply,
235				ToUserID:   m.parent.AuthorID,
236				FromUserID: u.UserID,
237				Title:      fmt.Sprintf("[BBS] %s 回了你的文章", u.UserID),
238				Body:       fmt.Sprintf("%s\n\n原文: %s", title, Truncate(m.parent.Title, 60)),
239			})
240		}
241		return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: m.boardID} }
242	}
243	
244	func (m postComposeModel) View() string {
245		var b strings.Builder
246		b.WriteString("\n")
247		if m.parent != nil {
248			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 回文 Reply "))
249			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("回覆 #%d  %s · %s",
250				m.parent.ID, m.parent.AuthorUserID, m.parent.Title)))
251		} else {
252			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 發表新文章 New Post "))
253		}
254		b.WriteString("\n\n")
255	
256		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Title:") + "\n")
257		b.WriteString("  " + m.title.View() + "\n\n")
258	
259		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Body:") + "\n")
260		b.WriteString("  " + indent(m.body.View(), "  ") + "\n")
261	
262		if m.err != "" {
263			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err) + "\n")
264		}
265		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("Tab switch field · Enter (in title) → body · Ctrl+S send · Ctrl+I import markdown · Esc cancel"))
266		b.WriteString("\n")
267		return b.String()
268	}
269	
270	func indent(s, prefix string) string {
271		lines := strings.Split(s, "\n")
272		for i, ln := range lines {
273			if i == 0 {
274				continue
275			}
276			lines[i] = prefix + ln
277		}
278		return strings.Join(lines, "\n")
279	}
280
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"errors"
6		"strings"
7	
8		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textarea"
9		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
10		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
11	
12		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
13	)
14	
15	const (
16		editFocusTitle = iota
17		editFocusBody
18	)
19	
20	// articleEditModel mirrors postComposeModel but pre-fills from an existing
21	// article and routes to ArticleRepo.Update on submit. This is a form
22	// screen — h/l are intentionally NOT bound (they belong to the textarea).
23	type articleEditModel struct {
24		deps      Deps
25		articleID int64
26		boardID   int64
27		title     textinput.Model
28		body      textarea.Model
29		focus     int
30		width     int
31		height    int
32		err       string
33		loadErr   error
34	}
35	
36	func newArticleEditModel(deps Deps, articleID int64) articleEditModel {
37		ti := textinput.New()
38		ti.Placeholder = "標題 title"
39		ti.CharLimit = 64
40		ti.Width = 60
41	
42		ta := textarea.New()
43		ta.Placeholder = "內容 body…"
44		ta.CharLimit = 8000
45		ta.SetWidth(72)
46		ta.SetHeight(12)
47	
48		m := articleEditModel{deps: deps, articleID: articleID, title: ti, body: ta, focus: editFocusTitle}
49	
50		if deps.User == nil {
51			m.loadErr = errors.New("not logged in")
52			return m
53		}
54		a, err := deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(context.Background(), articleID)
55		if err != nil {
56			m.loadErr = err
57			return m
58		}
59		// Permission check at construction time — deny early so the screen
60		// doesn't even mount for a user who can't edit. Mirrors
61		// canDeleteArticle: author OR mod+.
62		if a.AuthorID != deps.User.ID && !deps.User.Role.AtLeast(store.RoleMod) {
63			m.loadErr = store.ErrPermissionDenied
64			return m
65		}
66		m.boardID = a.BoardID
67		m.title.SetValue(a.Title)
68		m.body.SetValue(a.Body)
69		m.title.Focus()
70		return m
71	}
72	
73	func (m articleEditModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return textinput.Blink }
74	
75	func (m articleEditModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
76		switch msg := msg.(type) {
77		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
78			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
79			bodyW := max(40, msg.Width-8)
80			bodyH := max(8, msg.Height-12)
81			m.body.SetWidth(bodyW)
82			m.body.SetHeight(bodyH)
83			m.title.Width = max(20, msg.Width-12)
84			return m, nil
85	
86		case tea.KeyMsg:
87			if m.loadErr != nil {
88				// Any key bounces back to article view (or board view if we
89				// don't even know the article).
90				return m, m.cancelCmd()
91			}
92			switch msg.String() {
93			case "esc":
94				return m, m.cancelCmd()
95			case "tab":
96				m.toggleFocus()
97				return m, nil
98			case "ctrl+s":
99				return m.submit()
100			}
101		}
102	
103		if m.loadErr != nil {
104			return m, nil
105		}
106	
107		var cmd tea.Cmd
108		if m.focus == editFocusTitle {
109			if k, ok := msg.(tea.KeyMsg); ok && k.String() == "enter" {
110				m.toggleFocus()
111				return m, nil
112			}
113			m.title, cmd = m.title.Update(msg)
114		} else {
115			m.body, cmd = m.body.Update(msg)
116		}
117		return m, cmd
118	}
119	
120	func (m *articleEditModel) toggleFocus() {
121		if m.focus == editFocusTitle {
122			m.focus = editFocusBody
123			m.title.Blur()
124			m.body.Focus()
125		} else {
126			m.focus = editFocusTitle
127			m.body.Blur()
128			m.title.Focus()
129		}
130	}
131	
132	func (m articleEditModel) cancelCmd() tea.Cmd {
133		id := m.articleID
134		boardID := m.boardID
135		return func() tea.Msg {
136			// If we never loaded a board id (loadErr early), fall back to the
137			// board list — better than landing on an invalid article view.
138			if boardID == 0 {
139				return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardList}
140			}
141			return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenArticleView, ArticleID: id, BoardID: boardID}
142		}
143	}
144	
145	func (m articleEditModel) submit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
146		title := strings.TrimSpace(m.title.Value())
147		body := m.body.Value()
148		if title == "" {
149			m.err = "title is required"
150			return m, nil
151		}
152		if strings.TrimSpace(body) == "" {
153			m.err = "body is required"
154			return m, nil
155		}
156		ctx := context.Background()
157		u := m.deps.User
158		if err := m.deps.Store.Articles().Update(ctx, m.articleID, u.ID, u.Role, title, body); err != nil {
159			m.err = err.Error()
160			return m, nil
161		}
162		if m.deps.Broker != nil {
163			// Exclude the editor's own session — they already mutated their
164			// local article state by reloading on the way back to article view.
165			m.deps.Broker.SendToAll(u.ID, ArticleUpdatedMsg{ArticleID: m.articleID})
166		}
167		id := m.articleID
168		boardID := m.boardID
169		return m, func() tea.Msg {
170			return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenArticleView, ArticleID: id, BoardID: boardID}
171		}
172	}
173	
174	func (m articleEditModel) View() string {
175		var b strings.Builder
176		b.WriteString("\n")
177		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 編輯文章 Edit Post "))
178		b.WriteString("\n\n")
179	
180		if m.loadErr != nil {
181			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
182			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("press any key to go back"))
183			b.WriteString("\n")
184			return b.String()
185		}
186	
187		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Title:") + "\n")
188		b.WriteString("  " + m.title.View() + "\n\n")
189	
190		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Body:") + "\n")
191		b.WriteString("  " + indent(m.body.View(), "  ") + "\n")
192	
193		if m.err != "" {
194			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err) + "\n")
195		}
196		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("Tab switch field · Enter (in title) → body · Ctrl+S save · Esc cancel"))
197		b.WriteString("\n")
198		return b.String()
199	}
200
```

```text
14	// boardBannerEditModel is the mod+ form for editing a board's banner.
15	// Body-only (banners have no title); ctrl+s saves via
16	// BoardRepo.UpdateBanner, esc cancels back to the board view.
17	//
18	// h/l are intentionally NOT bound at the model level so they reach the
19	// underlying textarea for left/right cursor motion (same convention as
20	// screen_post_compose / screen_article_edit).

22		deps    Deps
23		boardID int64

26		height  int
27		err     string
28		loadErr error
29	}
30	
31	func newBoardBannerEditModel(deps Deps, boardID int64) boardBannerEditModel {
32		ta := textarea.New()
33		ta.Placeholder = "貼上 ANSI / ASCII art… (空字串會清掉 banner)"
34		ta.CharLimit = 16000
35		ta.SetWidth(72)
36		ta.SetHeight(14)
37	
38		m := boardBannerEditModel{deps: deps, boardID: boardID, body: ta}
39	
40		if deps.User == nil {
41			m.loadErr = errors.New("not logged in")

43		}
44		if !deps.User.Role.AtLeast(store.RoleMod) {
45			m.loadErr = store.ErrPermissionDenied
46			return m
47		}
48		board, err := deps.Store.Boards().GetByID(context.Background(), boardID)
49		if err != nil {
50			m.loadErr = err
51			return m
52		}
53		m.body.SetValue(board.Banner)
54		m.body.Focus()
55		return m
56	}
57	
58	func (m boardBannerEditModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return textarea.Blink }
59	
60	func (m boardBannerEditModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
61		switch msg := msg.(type) {
62		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
63			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
64			bodyW := max(40, msg.Width-8)
65			bodyH := max(8, msg.Height-12)
66			m.body.SetWidth(bodyW)

68			return m, nil

71			if m.loadErr != nil {

74			switch msg.String() {

105			m.err = err.Error()
```

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"strings"
7	
8		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
9		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
10	
11		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
12	)
13	
14	type boardViewModel struct {
15		deps         Deps
16		board        *store.Board
17		articles     []*store.Article
18		cursor       int
19		width        int
20		height       int
21		loadErr      error
22		search       textinput.Model   // input for the active search term
23		searchActive bool              // true while focused & accepting keys
24		filter       string            // confirmed title substring; "" = no filter
25		sort         store.ArticleSort // SortNewestFirst (default) or SortByScoreDesc
26	}
27	
28	func newBoardViewModel(deps Deps, boardID int64) boardViewModel {
29		ctx := context.Background()
30		board, err := deps.Store.Boards().GetByID(ctx, boardID)
31		if err != nil {
32			return boardViewModel{deps: deps, loadErr: err}
33		}
34		ti := textinput.New()
35		ti.Placeholder = "搜尋標題 / search title"
36		ti.CharLimit = 64
37		ti.Width = 50
38		m := boardViewModel{deps: deps, board: board, search: ti}
39		return m.reload(0)
40	}
41	
42	func (m boardViewModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
43	
44	// reload re-fetches articles using the current m.filter and m.sort and
45	// returns the updated model. anchorID > 0 keeps the cursor on the same
46	// article ID across the reflow; anchorID == 0 leaves the cursor at its
47	// numeric index (clamped to the new length). DB errors after the initial
48	// load are silent so a transient broadcast-driven refresh doesn't blank
49	// the screen — matches the pre-refactor behaviour of the inline reloads.
50	func (m boardViewModel) reload(anchorID int64) boardViewModel {
51		if m.board == nil {
52			return m
53		}
54		ctx := context.Background()
55		arts, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().ListByBoardOpts(ctx, m.board.ID,
56			store.ListArticlesOpts{Limit: 100, TitleSearch: m.filter, Sort: m.sort})
57		if err != nil {
58			if m.loadErr == nil {
59				m.loadErr = err
60			}
61			return m
62		}
63		m.articles = arts
64		if anchorID > 0 {
65			m.cursor = findCursorByID(arts, anchorID)
66		}
67		if m.cursor >= len(arts) {
68			m.cursor = max(0, len(arts)-1)
69		}
70		return m
71	}
72	
73	// currentAnchorID returns the cursored article's ID, or 0 if the list is
74	// empty. Used to preserve the highlight across reloads triggered by sort
75	// toggles or pin/mode broadcasts.
76	func (m boardViewModel) currentAnchorID() int64 {
77		if m.cursor < len(m.articles) {
78			return m.articles[m.cursor].ID
79		}
80		return 0
81	}
82	
83	func (m boardViewModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
84		switch msg := msg.(type) {
85		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
86			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
87			m.search.Width = max(20, msg.Width-12)
88			return m, nil
89		case ArticleAddedMsg:
90			if m.board != nil && msg.BoardID == m.board.ID {
91				// No anchor — preserve cursor index. Matches pre-refactor
92				// behaviour: a freshly added article shifts the cursor to
93				// what was previously one row below it (in newest-first sort).
94				m = m.reload(0)
95			}
96			return m, nil
97		case ArticlePinChangedMsg:
98			if m.board != nil && msg.BoardID == m.board.ID {
99				// Pin re-orders the list — re-anchor the cursor by article ID
100				// so the same article stays highlighted across the reflow.
101				m = m.reload(m.currentAnchorID())
102			}
103			return m, nil
104		case ArticleCommentsModeChangedMsg:
105			if m.board != nil && msg.BoardID == m.board.ID {
106				m = m.reload(m.currentAnchorID())
107			}
108			return m, nil
109		case tea.KeyMsg:
110			// While the search input is focused every printable key types into
111			// it; only enter (confirm), esc (cancel), and ctrl+c (handled at
112			// Root) escape that. Action keys (s/M/p/b/B/Q) and vim navigation
113			// (h/j/k/l/g/G/[/]) all become text characters during search.
114			if m.searchActive {
115				switch msg.String() {
116				case "enter":
117					m.filter = strings.TrimSpace(m.search.Value())
118					m.searchActive = false
119					m.search.Blur()
120					m.cursor = 0
121					m = m.reload(0)
122					return m, nil
123				case "esc":
124					m.search.SetValue("")
125					m.filter = ""
126					m.searchActive = false
127					m.search.Blur()
128					m.cursor = 0
129					m = m.reload(0)
130					return m, nil
131				}
132				var cmd tea.Cmd
133				m.search, cmd = m.search.Update(msg)
134				return m, cmd
135			}
136	
137			switch msg.String() {
138			case "/":
139				m.searchActive = true
140				m.search.SetValue(m.filter)
141				m.search.CursorEnd()
142				m.search.Focus()
143				return m, textinput.Blink
144			case "esc":
145				if m.filter != "" {
146					m.filter = ""
147					m.search.SetValue("")
148					m.cursor = 0
149					m = m.reload(0)
150					return m, nil
151				}
152				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardList} }
153			case "backspace", "left", "h":
154				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardList} }
155			case "Q":
156				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
157			case "s":
158				// Cycle sort. Anchor on the cursored article so the highlight
159				// follows the row across the reorder. NOTE(score-vs-pushcount):
160				// the user-facing label says 推文量 (push amount); under the hood
161				// we sort by recommend_score (signed +1/-1/0 sum). Acceptable
162				// proxy for now; if the product distinction matters later, add
163				// a maintained push_count column.
164				m.sort = (m.sort + 1) % 2
165				m = m.reload(m.currentAnchorID())
166				return m, nil
167			case "up", "k", "[":
168				if m.cursor > 0 {
169					m.cursor--
170				}
171			case "down", "j", "]":
172				if m.cursor < len(m.articles)-1 {
173					m.cursor++
174				}
175			case "home", "g":
176				m.cursor = 0
177			case "end", "G":
178				if len(m.articles) > 0 {
179					m.cursor = len(m.articles) - 1
180				}
181			case "enter", " ", "right", "l":
182				if len(m.articles) == 0 {
183					return m, nil
184				}
185				a := m.articles[m.cursor]
186				return m, func() tea.Msg {
187					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenArticleView, ArticleID: a.ID, BoardID: a.BoardID}
188				}
189			case "p":
190				if m.board == nil {
191					return m, nil
192				}
193				return m, func() tea.Msg {
194					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenPostCompose, BoardID: m.board.ID}
195				}
196			case "b":
197				if m.board == nil || m.board.Banner == "" {
198					return m, nil
199				}
200				return m, func() tea.Msg {
201					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardSplash, BoardID: m.board.ID}
202				}
203			case "B":
204				if m.board == nil || !m.canEditBanner() {
205					return m, nil
206				}
207				return m, func() tea.Msg {
208					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardBannerEdit, BoardID: m.board.ID}
209				}
210			case "M":
211				// Toggle pin on the cursor article. Mod+ only — silent no-op
212				// otherwise so non-mods don't get a confusing error toast for
213				// trying a key the help line doesn't even mention to them.
214				if m.board == nil || !m.canPin() || len(m.articles) == 0 {
215					return m, nil
216				}
217				a := m.articles[m.cursor]
218				pinned := !a.PinnedAt.Valid
219				ctx := context.Background()
220				u := m.deps.User
221				if err := m.deps.Store.Articles().SetPinned(ctx, a.ID, u.ID, u.Role, pinned); err != nil {
222					return m, nil
223				}
224				m = m.reload(a.ID)
225				if m.deps.Broker != nil {
226					m.deps.Broker.SendToAll(u.ID, ArticlePinChangedMsg{
227						BoardID: m.board.ID, ArticleID: a.ID, Pinned: pinned,
228					})
229				}
230				return m, nil
231			}
232		}
233		return m, nil
234	}
235	
236	func (m boardViewModel) View() string {
237		var b strings.Builder
238		b.WriteString("\n")
239		if m.board != nil {
240			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" 看板 %s · %s ", m.board.Name, m.board.Title)))
241		} else {
242			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 看板 "))
243		}
244		b.WriteString("\n\n")
245		b.WriteString(m.renderBanner())
246	
247		if m.loadErr != nil {
248			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
249			return b.String()
250		}
251	
252		// Search row + sort indicator. Search runs above the article table so the
253		// table's row layout stays predictable across show/hide.
254		switch {
255		case m.searchActive:
256			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("搜尋 / 標題: ") + m.search.View() + "\n")
257			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("(Enter 套用 · Esc 取消)") + "\n\n")
258		case m.filter != "":
259			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("[搜尋: %s · %d 筆 · / 修改 · Esc 清除]", m.filter, len(m.articles))) + "\n\n")
260		}
261	
262		if len(m.articles) == 0 {
263			hint := "(no articles yet — press p to write one)"
264			help := "p post · / search · ? help · Esc/←/h back · Ctrl+C disconnect"
265			if m.filter != "" {
266				hint = "(沒有符合的文章)"
267			}
268			if m.isGuest() {
269				hint = "(no articles yet)"
270				help = "/ search · ? help · Esc/←/h back · Ctrl+C disconnect"
271			}
272			help = m.appendBannerHelp(help)
273			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(hint) + "\n")
274			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render(help))
275			return b.String()
276		}
277	
278		const (
279			idxW    = 4
280			dateW   = 11
281			scoreW  = 4
282			authorW = 14
283		)
284		titleW := max(20, m.width-2-idxW-1-dateW-1-scoreW-1-authorW-2)
285		header := fmt.Sprintf(" %s  %s  %s  %s  %s",
286			PadRight("#", idxW),
287			PadRight("Date", dateW),
288			PadRight("Sc.", scoreW),
289			PadRight("Author", authorW),
290			PadRight("Title", titleW),
291		)
292		b.WriteString(StyleDim.Render(header))
293		if m.sort == store.SortByScoreDesc {
294			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("[排序: 推文量↓]"))
295		}
296		b.WriteString("\n")
297	
298		for i, a := range m.articles {
299			score := ""
300			switch {
301			case a.RecommendScore >= 100:
302				score = "爆"
303			case a.RecommendScore > 0:
304				score = fmt.Sprintf("%d", a.RecommendScore)
305			case a.RecommendScore < 0:
306				score = "X" + fmt.Sprintf("%d", -a.RecommendScore)
307			}
308			// Pinned (板規 / 置頂) articles surface a leading "[M] " marker —
309			// the same glyph PTT uses for M-marked posts. Locked / arrows-only
310			// articles stack additional [鎖] / [箭] badges so users see the
311			// constraint before opening the article. Long titles still get
312			// truncated by Truncate.
313			title := a.Title
314			var prefix string
315			if a.PinnedAt.Valid {
316				prefix += "[M]"
317			}
318			switch a.CommentsMode {
319			case store.CommentsModeLocked:
320				prefix += "[鎖]"
321			case store.CommentsModeArrowsOnly:
322				prefix += "[箭]"
323			}
324			if prefix != "" {
325				title = prefix + " " + a.Title
326			}
327			row := fmt.Sprintf(" %s  %s  %s  %s  %s",
328				PadRight(fmt.Sprintf("%d", i+1), idxW),
329				PadRight(a.CreatedAt.Format("01/02 15:04"), dateW),
330				PadRight(score, scoreW),
331				PadRight(a.AuthorUserID, authorW),
332				Truncate(title, titleW),
333			)
334			if i == m.cursor {
335				b.WriteString(StyleHighlight.Render("▸"+row[1:]) + "\n")
336			} else {
337				b.WriteString(" " + row + "\n")
338			}
339		}
340	
341		help := "↑/↓ j/k move · Enter/→/l open · p post · / search · s sort · ? help · Esc/←/h back · Ctrl+C disconnect"
342		if m.isGuest() {
343			help = "↑/↓ j/k move · Enter/→/l open · / search · s sort · ? help · Esc/←/h back · Ctrl+C disconnect"
344		}
345		help = m.appendBannerHelp(help)
346		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render(help))
347		b.WriteString("\n")
348		return b.String()
349	}
350	
351	func (m boardViewModel) isGuest() bool {
352		return m.deps.User != nil && m.deps.User.Role == store.RoleGuest
353	}
354	
355	func (m boardViewModel) canEditBanner() bool {
356		return m.deps.User != nil && m.deps.User.Role.AtLeast(store.RoleMod)
357	}
358	
359	// canPin gates the M shortcut. Mirrors canEditBanner — pinning is a
360	// moderation action and intentionally does NOT admit the article author
361	// (an author shouldn't bubble their own post to the top).
362	func (m boardViewModel) canPin() bool {
363		return m.deps.User != nil && m.deps.User.Role.AtLeast(store.RoleMod)
364	}
365	
366	// findCursorByID returns the index of the article with the given ID in
367	// the slice, or 0 if not found. Used to re-anchor the cursor after a
368	// pin/unpin reorders the list.
369	func findCursorByID(arts []*store.Article, id int64) int {
370		for i, a := range arts {
371			if a.ID == id {
372				return i
373			}
374		}
375		return 0
376	}
377	
378	// appendBannerHelp tacks "b banner" / "B edit" / "M pin" hints onto a
379	// help-line only when relevant: `b` requires a non-empty banner; `B` and
380	// `M` require mod+. Order matches the existing pattern (action keys
381	// before navigation). Name kept for git-blame stability — it now covers
382	// all mod-affordances on the board view, not just banner ones.
383	func (m boardViewModel) appendBannerHelp(help string) string {
384		if m.board != nil && m.board.Banner != "" {
385			help += " · b banner"
386		}
387		if m.canEditBanner() {
388			help += " · B edit"
389		}
390		if m.canPin() {
391			help += " · M pin/unpin"
392		}
393		return help
394	}
395	
396	const maxInlineBannerLines = 8
397	
398	// renderBanner produces the inline banner block shown above the article
399	// list. Empty string when the board has no banner. Each line is
400	// ANSI-aware-truncated to the viewport width with a 2-space left margin;
401	// the block is capped at maxInlineBannerLines with a "(press b)" hint
402	// when the source has more.
403	func (m boardViewModel) renderBanner() string {
404		if m.board == nil || m.board.Banner == "" {
405			return ""
406		}
407		width := m.width - 2
408		if width < 20 {
409			// Before the first WindowSizeMsg lands m.width is 0; fall back to a
410			// generous default so the banner doesn't render as a single column.
411			width = 78
412		}
413		lines := strings.Split(strings.TrimRight(m.board.Banner, "\n"), "\n")
414		limit := maxInlineBannerLines
415		truncated := false
416		if len(lines) > limit {
417			lines = lines[:limit]
418			truncated = true
419		}
420		var out strings.Builder
421		for _, line := range lines {
422			out.WriteString("  ")
423			out.WriteString(bannerTruncate(line, width))
424			out.WriteString("\n")
425		}
426		if truncated {
427			out.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("…(banner truncated — press b for full view)") + "\n")
428		}
429		out.WriteString("\n")
430		return out.String()
431	}
432
```

```text
13	// boardSplashModel renders a board's banner full-screen. It's reached by
14	// pressing `b` from the board view; any key returns. No edit / scroll —
15	// banners that overflow the viewport rely on terminal scrollback (we
16	// don't try to paginate because banners are typically short, and adding
17	// scroll machinery clashes with "any key returns").
18	type boardSplashModel struct {
19		deps    Deps
20		board   *store.Board
21		boardID int64
22		width   int
23		height  int
24		loadErr error
25	}
26	
27	func newBoardSplashModel(deps Deps, boardID int64) boardSplashModel {
28		board, err := deps.Store.Boards().GetByID(context.Background(), boardID)
29		if err != nil {
30			return boardSplashModel{deps: deps, boardID: boardID, loadErr: err}
31		}
32		return boardSplashModel{deps: deps, board: board, boardID: boardID}
33	}
34	
35	func (m boardSplashModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
36	
37	func (m boardSplashModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
38		switch msg := msg.(type) {
39		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
40			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
41			return m, nil
42		case tea.KeyMsg:
43			_ = msg
44			// Any key returns to the board view. The board id is preserved
45			// even if loadErr — better than dumping the user back to the
46			// board list when the only thing that failed was a banner re-fetch.
47			return m, func() tea.Msg {
48				return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: m.boardID}
49			}
50		}
51		return m, nil
52	}
53	
54	func (m boardSplashModel) View() string {
55		var b strings.Builder
56		b.WriteString("\n")
57		if m.board != nil {
58			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" 看板 banner · %s ", m.board.Name)))
59		} else {
60			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 看板 banner "))
61		}
62		b.WriteString("\n\n")
63	
64		if m.loadErr != nil {
65			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
66			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("press any key to return"))
67			return b.String()
68		}
69		if m.board == nil || m.board.Banner == "" {
70			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("(this board has no banner yet)") + "\n")
71			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("press any key to return"))
72			return b.String()
73		}
74	
75		width := m.width - 2
76		if width < 20 {
77			width = 78
78		}
79		for _, line := range strings.Split(strings.TrimRight(m.board.Banner, "\n"), "\n") {
80			b.WriteString("  ")
81			b.WriteString(bannerTruncate(line, width))
82			b.WriteString("\n")
83		}
84	
85		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("press any key to return · Esc/Enter/q also work"))
86		b.WriteString("\n")
87		return b.String()
88	}
```

```text
140	func (m articleExportModel) lineCount() int {
141		return len(strings.Split(m.rendered, "\n"))
142	}
143	
144	func (m articleExportModel) viewportLines() int {
145		return max(m.height-10, 5)
146	}
147	
148	// writeToDisk dumps the rendered markdown to data/exports/<userid>/<id>-<ts>.md.
149	// Guests are blocked: they have no UserID we'd want to write to disk, and
150	// they're a shared sentinel account anyway.
151	func (m *articleExportModel) writeToDisk() {
152		if m.deps.User == nil || m.deps.User.Role == store.RoleGuest {
153			m.statusLine = "guest 不能寫檔 (read-only)"
154			return
155		}
156		dir := filepath.Join("data", "exports", m.deps.User.UserID)
157		if err := os.MkdirAll(dir, 0o755); err != nil {
158			m.statusLine = "mkdir: " + err.Error()
159			return
160		}
161		name := fmt.Sprintf("%d-%d.md", m.articleID, time.Now().Unix())
162		path := filepath.Join(dir, name)
163		if err := os.WriteFile(path, []byte(m.rendered), 0o644); err != nil {
164			m.statusLine = "write: " + err.Error()
165			return
166		}
167		m.statusLine = "已寫入 " + path
168	}
169	
170	// copyToClipboard pushes the rendered markdown via OSC 52. Most modern
171	// terminals honour this; some (Terminal.app default) silently drop it.
172	func (m *articleExportModel) copyToClipboard() {
173		if len(m.rendered) > osc52Limit {
174			m.statusLine = fmt.Sprintf("⚠ %dB 超過 OSC52 上限，可能被終端機截斷；改按 3 寫檔", len(m.rendered))
175		} else {
176			m.statusLine = "已複製到剪貼簿（需終端機支援 OSC 52）"
177		}
178		_ = emitClipboardOSC52(m.rendered)
179	}
180	
181	func (m articleExportModel) View() string {
182		var b strings.Builder
183		b.WriteString("\n")
184		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 匯出 markdown · Export "))
185		b.WriteString("\n\n")
186	
187		if m.loadErr != nil {
188			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
189			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("press any key to go back"))
190			b.WriteString("\n")
191			return b.String()
192		}
193	
194		lines := strings.Split(m.rendered, "\n")
195		maxLines := m.viewportLines()
196		start := min(m.scroll, len(lines))
197		end := min(start+maxLines, len(lines))
198		for _, line := range lines[start:end] {
199			b.WriteString(line + "\n")
200		}
201		if start > 0 || end < len(lines) {
202			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("[lines %d-%d / %d]", start+1, end, len(lines))))
203			b.WriteString("\n")
204		}
205	
206		help := "1 純內文 · 2 含留言 · 3 寫檔 · c 剪貼簿 (OSC52) · j/k 卷動 · Esc 返回"
207		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render(help))
208		if m.statusLine != "" {
209			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleSuccess.Render(m.statusLine))
210		}
211		b.WriteString("\n")
212		return b.String()
213	}
214
```

```text
1	package tui

4		"context"

15	)
16	
17	// articleExportModel renders an article (with optional pushes) as
18	// markdown for the user to copy. Three exits:
19	//   - mouse-select in the terminal scrollback (always works; just View)
20	//   - `c` → emit OSC 52 to push into the local terminal clipboard
21	//   - `3` → write to data/exports/<userid>/<id>-<unix>.md (registered users)
22	//
23	// Read-only screen — no permission gates beyond "guest can't write to disk".
24	type articleExportModel struct {
25		deps      Deps
26		articleID int64
27		article   *store.Article
28		pushes    []*store.Push
29		board     *store.Board
30	
31		includePushes bool
32		width, height int
33		scroll        int
34		rendered      string
35		loadErr       error
36	
37		// transient feedback line shown under the help footer.
38		statusLine string
39	}
40	
41	func newArticleExportModel(deps Deps, articleID int64) articleExportModel {
42		ctx := context.Background()
43		m := articleExportModel{deps: deps, articleID: articleID}
44		a, err := deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, articleID)
45		if err != nil {
46			m.loadErr = err
47			return m
48		}
49		pushes, _ := deps.Store.Pushes().ListByArticle(ctx, articleID)
50		board, _ := deps.Store.Boards().GetByID(ctx, a.BoardID)
```

```text
345	// updateDeleteConfirm handles y/n while the confirm overlay is up.
346	// y: dispatch the delete; if targeting a push, refresh the push list
347	// and the article (for the score). If targeting the article, navigate
348	// back to the board view.
349	// n / esc: cancel.
350	func (m articleViewModel) updateDeleteConfirm(msg tea.KeyMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
351		switch msg.String() {
352		case "y", "Y":
353			if m.article == nil || m.deps.User == nil {
354				m.pendingDelete = false
355				return m, nil
356			}
357			ctx := context.Background()
358			if m.pushCursor >= 0 && m.pushCursor < len(m.pushes) {
359				pushID := m.pushes[m.pushCursor].ID
360				if err := m.deps.Store.Pushes().Delete(ctx, pushID, m.deps.User.ID, m.deps.User.Role); err != nil {
361					m.err = err.Error()
362					m.pendingDelete = false
363					return m, nil
364				}
365				// Refresh the push list and re-fetch the article so its
366				// recommend_score reflects the reverted delta.
367				if pushes, err := m.deps.Store.Pushes().ListByArticle(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
368					m.pushes = pushes
369				}
```
