```text
410	func (m articleViewModel) viewportLines() int {
411		return max(m.height-16, 5)
412	}
413	
414	func (m articleViewModel) openPush(k store.PushKind) tea.Model {
415		// Early gate based on the cached article state. The store-side check
416		// in PushRepo.Create is the authoritative gate (handles races between
417		// sessions), but rejecting here gives a friendlier error than the
418		// raw sentinel and avoids opening the input box at all.
419		if m.article != nil {
420			switch m.article.CommentsMode {
421			case store.CommentsModeLocked:
422				m.err = "本文已鎖定留言"
423				return m
424			case store.CommentsModeArrowsOnly:
425				if k != store.PushKindArrow {
426					m.err = "本文僅開放箭頭留言"
427					return m
428				}
429			}
430		}
431		m.pushing = true
432		m.pushKind = k
433		m.pushIn.SetValue("")
434		m.pushIn.Focus()
435		m.err = ""
436		return m
437	}
438	
439	// updateCommentsModePicker handles 1/2/3/Esc while the comments-mode
440	// picker overlay is up. On a successful flip it refetches the article
441	// locally and broadcasts ArticleCommentsModeChangedMsg so other live
442	// sessions update their badges and gates.
443	func (m articleViewModel) updateCommentsModePicker(msg tea.KeyMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
444		if m.article == nil || m.deps.User == nil {
445			m.pickingCommentsMode = false
446			return m, nil
447		}
448		var mode store.CommentsMode
449		switch msg.String() {
450		case "1":
451			mode = store.CommentsModeOpen
452		case "2":
453			mode = store.CommentsModeArrowsOnly
454		case "3":
455			mode = store.CommentsModeLocked
456		case "esc", "n", "N":
457			m.pickingCommentsMode = false
458			return m, nil
459		default:
460			return m, nil
461		}
462		ctx := context.Background()
463		u := m.deps.User
464		if err := m.deps.Store.Articles().SetCommentsMode(ctx, m.article.ID, u.ID, u.Role, mode); err != nil {
465			m.err = err.Error()
466			m.pickingCommentsMode = false
467			return m, nil
468		}
469		if a, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
470			m.article = a
471		}
472		m.pickingCommentsMode = false
473		if m.deps.Broker != nil {
474			m.deps.Broker.SendToAll(u.ID, ArticleCommentsModeChangedMsg{
475				BoardID:   m.article.BoardID,
476				ArticleID: m.article.ID,
477				Mode:      string(mode),
478			})
479		}
480		return m, nil
481	}
482	
483	func (m articleViewModel) updatePushInput(msg tea.KeyMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
484		switch msg.String() {
485		case "esc":
486			m.pushing = false
487			m.pushIn.Blur()
488			return m, nil
489		case "enter":
490			body := strings.TrimSpace(m.pushIn.Value())
491			if body == "" && m.pushKind != store.PushKindArrow {
492				m.err = "comment required for 推/噓"
493				return m, nil
494			}
495			// Late gate: re-check comments_mode in case the cached article
496			// is stale. Server-side will also reject (PushRepo.Create), but
497			// catching here surfaces a friendlier message than the sentinel.
498			if m.article != nil {
499				switch m.article.CommentsMode {
500				case store.CommentsModeLocked:
501					m.err = "本文已鎖定留言"
502					m.pushing = false
503					m.pushIn.Blur()
504					return m, nil
505				case store.CommentsModeArrowsOnly:
506					if m.pushKind != store.PushKindArrow {
507						m.err = "本文僅開放箭頭留言"
508						m.pushing = false
509						m.pushIn.Blur()
510						return m, nil
511					}
512				}
513			}
514			ctx := context.Background()
515			u := m.deps.User
516			p, err := m.deps.Store.Pushes().Create(ctx, m.article.ID, u.ID, u.UserID, m.pushKind, body)
517			if err != nil {
518				m.err = err.Error()
519				return m, nil
520			}
521			// Append locally so the originator sees it immediately.
522			m.pushes = append(m.pushes, p)
523			if a, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
524				m.article = a
525			}
526			m.pushing = false
527			m.pushIn.Blur()
528			// Broadcast to other live sessions; they filter by ArticleID.
529			if m.deps.Broker != nil {
530				m.deps.Broker.SendToAll(u.ID, PushAddedMsg{
531					ArticleID:  m.article.ID,
532					UserUserID: u.UserID,
533					Kind:       string(m.pushKind),
534					Body:       body,
535				})
536			}
537			// Webhook notification to the article's author. Skip self-pushes
538			// — pushing on your own article doesn't need to wake your phone.
539			if m.deps.Notify != nil && m.article.AuthorID != u.ID {
540				m.deps.Notify.Dispatch(notify.Event{
541					Kind:       notify.KindPush,
542					ToUserID:   m.article.AuthorID,
543					FromUserID: u.UserID,
544					Title:      fmt.Sprintf("[BBS] %s %s 了你的文章", u.UserID, kindLabel(m.pushKind)),
545					Body:       fmt.Sprintf("%s\n\n%s", Truncate(m.article.Title, 60), body),
546				})
547			}
548			return m, nil
549		}
550		var cmd tea.Cmd
551		m.pushIn, cmd = m.pushIn.Update(msg)
552		return m, cmd
553	}
554	
555	func (m articleViewModel) View() string {
556		if m.loadErr != nil {
557			return "\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n"
558		}
559		if m.article == nil {
```
```text
560			return "\n  " + StyleDim.Render("(no article)") + "\n"
561		}
562		a := m.article
563	
564		var b strings.Builder
565		b.WriteString("\n")
566		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" 文章 #%d · %s ", a.ID, a.AuthorUserID)))
567		b.WriteString("\n\n")
568	
569		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Title: ") + a.Title + "\n")
```

```text
498	// quoteForReply renders the parent mail as a markdown blockquote suitable
499	// for pre-filling the reply body. Format:
500	//
501	//	> alice · 2026-05-06 14:23 寫道:
502	//	>
503	//	> previous body line 1
504	//	> previous body line 2
505	//
506	//	<cursor lands here>
507	//
508	// Empty lines in the parent body are still prefixed with "> " so the
509	// blockquote stays contiguous (matches RFC 3676 / common email-client
510	// convention).
511	func quoteForReply(parent *store.Mail) string {
512		var b strings.Builder
513		fmt.Fprintf(&b, "> %s · %s 寫道:\n>\n",
514			parent.FromUserIDStr,
515			parent.CreatedAt.Format("2006-01-02 15:04"),
516		)
517		for _, line := range strings.Split(parent.Body, "\n") {
518			b.WriteString("> ")
519			b.WriteString(line)
520			b.WriteString("\n")
521		}
522		b.WriteString("\n")
523		return b.String()
524	}
525	
526	func (m mailComposeModel) View() string {
527		var b strings.Builder
528		b.WriteString("\n")
529		if m.parentID == 0 {
530			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 寫信 New Mail "))
531		} else {
532			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 回信 Reply "))
533		}
534		b.WriteString("\n\n")
535	
536		if m.sent != "" {
537			b.WriteString("  " + StyleSuccess.Render("✓ sent to "+m.sent) + "\n\n")
538			b.WriteString("  " + StyleHelp.Render("any key returns to inbox"))
539			return b.String()
```

```text
16	// notifyTestResultMsg is delivered by the goroutine that ran SendTest.
17	// The screen renders msg.err in the error/flash row so the user sees
18	// the HTTP outcome inline.
19	type notifyTestResultMsg struct {
20		targetID int64
21		err      error
22	}
23	
24	// notifySettingsModel is the unified screen for the per-event toggles
25	// (user_notif_prefs) and webhook target list (user_notif_targets).
26	//
27	// Layout:
28	//
29	//   - Top: 5 boolean toggles (Push / WB / Mail / Reply / OnlyWhenOffline)
30	//     navigated with j/k, flipped with Space. Persisted via Ctrl+S.
31	//   - Bottom: target list, then "+ Add new target" entry. Targets toggle
32	//     enabled with `t`, edit with `e`, delete with `d`. Adds and edits
33	//     pop an inline two-field form (label + URL).
34	//
35	// State machine: mode == modeList during normal browsing; switches to
36	// modeEdit while the inline form is up. Mirrors the inline-textinput-
37	// inside-list pattern used by screen_wb.go.
38	type notifySettingsModel struct {
39		deps Deps
40	
41		prefs   store.NotifyPrefs
42		targets []*store.NotifyTarget
43		loadErr error
44	
45		cursor      int  // 0..4 = toggles, 5..5+N-1 = targets, 5+N = "+ add"
46		prefsDirty  bool // true if Ctrl+S would persist a change
47	
48		mode editMode
49	
50		editLabel textinput.Model
51		editURL   textinput.Model
52		editFocus int   // 0 = label, 1 = url
53		editingID int64 // 0 for new target, otherwise target.ID
54	
55		width  int
56		height int
57		err    string
58		flash  string // transient success message
59	}
60	
61	type editMode int
62	
63	const (
64		modeList editMode = iota
65		modeEdit
66	)
67	
68	const (
69		notifPrefCount = 5 // Push, WB, Mail, Reply, OnlyWhenOffline
70	)
71	
72	func newNotifySettingsModel(deps Deps) notifySettingsModel {
73		m := notifySettingsModel{deps: deps}
74		m.editLabel = textinput.New()
75		m.editLabel.Placeholder = "label (任意便於辨識的名稱)"
76		m.editLabel.CharLimit = 64
77		m.editLabel.Width = 60
78		m.editURL = textinput.New()
79		m.editURL.Placeholder = "Discord webhook URL / https://ntfy.sh/<topic> / 任何 HTTP(S) 端點"
80		m.editURL.CharLimit = 512
81		m.editURL.Width = 60
82	
83		if deps.User != nil && deps.Store != nil {
84			ctx := context.Background()

86			if err != nil {

89			m.prefs = p
90			ts, err := deps.Store.Notify().ListTargets(ctx, deps.User.ID)
91			if err != nil && m.loadErr == nil {
92				m.loadErr = err
93			}
94			m.targets = ts
95		}
96		return m
97	}

99	func (m notifySettingsModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return textinput.Blink }
```

```text
295	// startTest fires a one-shot test notification at the cursored target.
296	// Returns a tea.Cmd that runs the HTTP call in a goroutine (the
297	// dispatcher's http.Client has a 5s timeout) and rendezvous-es the
298	// result back as a notifyTestResultMsg.
299	func (m *notifySettingsModel) startTest() tea.Cmd {
300		idx := m.cursor - notifPrefCount
301		if idx < 0 || idx >= len(m.targets) {
302			return nil
303		}
304		t := m.targets[idx]
305		if m.deps.Notify == nil {
306			// Tests / register-only sessions: no dispatcher wired up. Fail
307			// loud rather than silently no-op.
308			m.err = "notify dispatcher not initialised"
309			return nil
310		}
311		m.flash = fmt.Sprintf("🔔 testing target #%d…", t.ID)
312		m.err = ""
313		// Snapshot the values the goroutine needs so we don't reach back into
314		// the model after returning (model updates are funnelled through
315		// Update by bubbletea's main loop).
316		target := *t
317		user := ""
318		if m.deps.User != nil {
319			user = m.deps.User.UserID
320		}
321		dispatcher := m.deps.Notify
322		return func() tea.Msg {
323			ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 8*time.Second)
324			defer cancel()
325			ev := notify.Event{
326				Kind:       notify.KindPush, // bypassed by SendTest; here just for log readability
327				ToUserID:   target.UserID,
328				FromUserID: user,
329				Title:      "[BBS-test] notification target verified",
330				Body: fmt.Sprintf(
331					"User: %s\nTarget: #%d (%s)\nTime: %s\n\nIf you can read this, the webhook URL is wired up correctly.",
332					user, target.ID, target.Label, time.Now().Format("2006-01-02 15:04:05"),
333				),
334			}
335			return notifyTestResultMsg{
336				targetID: target.ID,
337				err:      dispatcher.SendTest(ctx, &target, ev),
338			}
339		}
340	}
```

```text
360	func (m notifySettingsModel) updateEdit(msg tea.KeyMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
361		switch msg.String() {
362		case "esc":
363			m.mode = modeList
364			m.err = ""
365			return m, nil
366		case "tab", "down":
367			m.cycleEditFocus()
368			return m, nil
369		case "shift+tab", "up":
370			m.cycleEditFocus()
371			return m, nil
372		case "enter", "ctrl+s":
373			return m.submitEdit()
374		}
375		var cmd tea.Cmd
376		if m.editFocus == 0 {
377			m.editLabel, cmd = m.editLabel.Update(msg)
378		} else {
379			m.editURL, cmd = m.editURL.Update(msg)
380		}
381		return m, cmd
382	}
383	
384	func (m *notifySettingsModel) cycleEditFocus() {
385		if m.editFocus == 0 {
386			m.editFocus = 1
387			m.editLabel.Blur()
388			m.editURL.Focus()
389		} else {
390			m.editFocus = 0
391			m.editURL.Blur()
392			m.editLabel.Focus()
393		}
394	}
395	
396	func (m notifySettingsModel) submitEdit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
397		if m.deps.User == nil {
398			m.err = "internal error: no user"
399			return m, nil
400		}
401		label := strings.TrimSpace(m.editLabel.Value())
402		url := strings.TrimSpace(m.editURL.Value())
403		if err := store.ValidateNotifyURL(url); err != nil {
404			m.err = err.Error()
405			return m, nil
406		}
407		ctx := context.Background()
408		if m.editingID == 0 {
409			// Insert new.
410			id, err := m.deps.Store.Notify().AddTarget(ctx, m.deps.User.ID, label, url)
411			if err != nil {
412				m.err = err.Error()
413				return m, nil
414			}
415			// Re-list so created_at reflects the canonical row order.
416			ts, _ := m.deps.Store.Notify().ListTargets(ctx, m.deps.User.ID)
417			m.targets = ts
418			m.flash = fmt.Sprintf("✓ 已新增 target #%d", id)
419		} else {
420			// Update existing — preserve enabled state.
421			var enabled = true
422			for _, t := range m.targets {
423				if t.ID == m.editingID {
424					enabled = t.Enabled
425					break
426				}
427			}
428			if err := m.deps.Store.Notify().UpdateTarget(ctx, m.editingID, m.deps.User.ID, label, url, enabled); err != nil {
429				m.err = err.Error()
430				return m, nil
431			}
432			ts, _ := m.deps.Store.Notify().ListTargets(ctx, m.deps.User.ID)
433			m.targets = ts
434			m.flash = fmt.Sprintf("✓ 已更新 target #%d", m.editingID)
435		}
436		m.mode = modeList
437		m.editingID = 0
438		m.err = ""
439		return m, nil
440	}
441	
442	func (m notifySettingsModel) View() string {
443		var b strings.Builder
444		b.WriteString("\n")
445		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 通知設定 Notification settings "))
446		b.WriteString("\n\n")
447	
448		if m.loadErr != nil {
449			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
450		}
451	
452		// Section 1: prefs toggles.
453		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("事件 Events") + "\n")
454		prefsRows := []struct {
455			label string
456			on    bool
457			note  string
458		}{
459			{"推/噓 我的文章 (push)", m.prefs.OnPush, "someone pushed/booed my article"},
460			{"收到水球 (wb)", m.prefs.OnWB, "私訊 DM"},
461			{"收到站內信 (mail)", m.prefs.OnMail, "persistent threaded mail"},
462			{"有人回文 Re: (reply)", m.prefs.OnReply, "someone posted a Re: reply on my article"},
463			{"僅在離線時通知 only-when-offline", m.prefs.OnlyWhenOffline, "skip dispatch when I have a live session"},
464		}
465		for i, r := range prefsRows {
466			marker := "  "
467			check := "[ ]"
468			if r.on {
469				check = "[x]"
470			}
471			row := fmt.Sprintf("  %s  %d. %s", check, i+1, r.label)
472			if i == m.cursor && m.mode == modeList {
473				marker = "▸ "
474				row = StyleHighlight.Render(fmt.Sprintf("  %s  %d. %-44s", check, i+1, r.label))
475			}
476			b.WriteString(marker + row + "  " + StyleDim.Render(r.note) + "\n")
477		}
478	
479		if m.prefsDirty {
480			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleDim.Render("(prefs unsaved — Ctrl+S to persist)") + "\n")
481		}
482	
483		// Section 2: target list.
484		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleDim.Render("通知目標 Webhook targets") + "\n")
485		if len(m.targets) == 0 {
486			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("  (尚未設定 target — 按 a 新增)") + "\n")
487		} else {
488			for i, t := range m.targets {
489				rowIdx := notifPrefCount + i
490				marker := "  "
491				check := "[×]"
492				if t.Enabled {
493					check = "[✓]"
494				}
495				label := t.Label
496				if label == "" {
497					label = "(no label)"
498				}
499				row := fmt.Sprintf("  %s #%d %s  %s", check, t.ID, PadRight(Truncate(label, 24), 24), Truncate(t.URL, 60))
500				if rowIdx == m.cursor && m.mode == modeList {
501					marker = "▸ "
502					row = StyleHighlight.Render(row)
503				}
504				b.WriteString(marker + row + "\n")
505			}
506		}
507	
508		// Add row.
509		addRow := "  + 新增 target Add new target"
510		if m.addRowIndex() == m.cursor && m.mode == modeList {
511			b.WriteString("▸ " + StyleHighlight.Render(addRow) + "\n")
512		} else {
513			b.WriteString("  " + addRow + "\n")
514		}
515	
516		// Inline edit form.
517		if m.mode == modeEdit {
518			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHeader.Render(" Webhook target ") + "\n\n")
519			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Label:") + "\n  " + m.editLabel.View() + "\n\n")
520			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("URL (http:// or https://):") + "\n  " + m.editURL.View() + "\n")
521			if m.err != "" {
522				b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err))
523			}
524			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("Tab cycle field · Enter/Ctrl+S save · Esc cancel"))
525			b.WriteString("\n")
526			return b.String()
527		}
528	
529		if m.err != "" {
530			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err))
531		}
532		if m.flash != "" {
533			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleSuccess.Render(m.flash))
534		}
535		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("j/k move · Space toggle/select · Ctrl+S save prefs · a 新增 · e 編輯 · t 啟停 · T 測試 · d 刪除 · Esc back"))
536		b.WriteString("\n")
537		return b.String()
538	}
539
```

```text
91	func (m adminUsersModel) applyRole(target store.Role) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
92		if len(m.users) == 0 || m.cursor < 0 || m.cursor >= len(m.users) {
93			return m, nil
94		}
95		u := m.users[m.cursor]
96		if u.Role == target {
97			m.toast = fmt.Sprintf("%s 已是 %s", u.UserID, target)
98			return m, nil
99		}
100		// Last-admin guard: refuse to demote the only remaining admin.
101		if u.Role == store.RoleAdmin && target != store.RoleAdmin {
102			count, err := m.deps.Store.Users().CountByRole(context.Background(), store.RoleAdmin)
103			if err != nil {
104				m.toast = err.Error()
105				return m, nil
106			}
107			if count <= 1 {
108				m.toast = "無法解除最後一名管理員 (cannot demote the last admin)"
109				return m, nil
110			}
111		}
112		if err := m.deps.Store.Users().SetRole(context.Background(), u.ID, target); err != nil {
113			if errors.Is(err, store.ErrInvalidRole) {
114				m.toast = "invalid role"
115			} else {
116				m.toast = err.Error()
117			}
118			return m, nil
119		}
120		m.toast = fmt.Sprintf("%s → %s", u.UserID, target)
121		m.reload()
122		return m, nil
123	}
124	
125	func (m adminUsersModel) View() string {
126		var b strings.Builder
127		b.WriteString("\n")
128		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 使用者管理 Admin Users "))
129		b.WriteString("\n\n")
130	
131		if m.loadErr != nil {
132			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
133			return b.String()
134		}
```

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"fmt"
5	
6		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/notify"
7	)
8	
9	// notifyWB fires a KindWB event for a delivered water balloon. Skipped when
10	// the dispatcher is nil (tests / register-only sessions). Self-WB is
11	// expected to be filtered at the call site (see CLAUDE.md: self-WB is a
12	// memo and intentionally bypasses Broker.Send).
13	func notifyWB(deps Deps, toUserID int64, fromUserID, body string) {
14		if deps.Notify == nil {
15			return
16		}
17		deps.Notify.Dispatch(notify.Event{
18			Kind:       notify.KindWB,
19			ToUserID:   toUserID,
20			FromUserID: fromUserID,
21			Title:      fmt.Sprintf("[BBS] %s 丟了水球給你", fromUserID),
22			Body:       body,
23		})
```

```go
package tui

import (
	"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/i18n"
	"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/notify"
)

// notifyWB fires a KindWB event for a delivered water balloon. Skipped when
// the dispatcher is nil (tests / register-only sessions). Self-WB is
// expected to be filtered at the call site (see CLAUDE.md: self-WB is a
// memo and intentionally bypasses Broker.Send).
//
// Title renders in the RECIPIENT's locale — they read the toast on their
// phone. recipientLocale falls back to i18n.Default on any DB error.
func notifyWB(deps Deps, toUserID int64, fromUserID, body string) {
	if deps.Notify == nil {
		return
	}
	loc := recipientLocale(deps, toUserID)
	deps.Notify.Dispatch(notify.Event{
		Kind:       notify.KindWB,
		ToUserID:   toUserID,
		FromUserID: fromUserID,
		Title:      i18n.Tf(loc, i18n.NotifyWBTitle, fromUserID),
		Body:       body,
	})
}

// notifyMail fires a KindMail event for delivered mail. Self-mail is
// expected to be filtered at the call site. Title renders in the
// recipient's locale (see notifyWB).
func notifyMail(deps Deps, toUserID int64, fromUserID, subject, body string) {
	if deps.Notify == nil {
		return
	}
	// Cap the body excerpt — mail body can be 4 KB and most webhook
	// receivers truncate aggressively anyway.
	excerpt := body
	if len(excerpt) > 280 {
		excerpt = excerpt[:280] + "…"
	}
	loc := recipientLocale(deps, toUserID)
	deps.Notify.Dispatch(notify.Event{
		Kind:       notify.KindMail,
		ToUserID:   toUserID,
		FromUserID: fromUserID,
		Title:      i18n.Tf(loc, i18n.NotifyMailTitle, fromUserID, subject),
		Body:       excerpt,
	})
}

```

```text
262	// renderHelp builds the full-screen help overlay for the given screen.

265		var b strings.Builder

267	
268		sections, ok := screenHelp[s]

289		}
290	
291		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("press any key to dismiss"))
292	
293		return helpBox.Render(b.String())
```

```text
40	// event lands as a 水球 toast or a webhook delivery.

49	// OnlineChecker is the slice of *chat.Broker the dispatcher needs for
50	// the only_when_offline pref. Decoupled so tests can substitute a fake.
51	type OnlineChecker interface {
52		IsOnline(uid int64) bool
53	}

55	// Manager is the dispatcher. Construct with New, start workers with Start,
56	// and call Dispatch from event call sites. Dispatch is non-blocking — a
57	// full queue drops the event and logs (we never want notification I/O to
58	// stall an Update path).
59	type Manager struct {
60		store  *store.Store
61		online OnlineChecker
62

64		client  *http.Client
65		workers int
66

72	// payload is the JSON body POSTed to every target. Matches apprise-api's
73	// /notify/<key> contract; non-apprise webhook receivers either consume
74	// these fields directly (most tooling does) or template against them.
75	type payload struct {
76		Title string `json:"title"`
77		Body  string `json:"body"`
78	}
79	
80	const (
81		defaultQueue   = 256
82		defaultWorkers = 4
83		defaultTimeout = 5 * time.Second
84	)
85	
86	// New builds a Manager. online may be nil for tests that don't care about
87	// the only_when_offline pref.
88	func New(st *store.Store, online OnlineChecker) *Manager {
89		return &Manager{
90			store:   st,
91			online:  online,
92			queue:   make(chan Event, defaultQueue),
93			client:  &http.Client{Timeout: defaultTimeout},
94			workers: defaultWorkers,
95		}
96	}
97	
98	// Start spawns N worker goroutines that read from the queue and POST
99	// notifications until ctx is cancelled. Returns immediately. Call Stop()
100	// from the server's shutdown path to drain in-flight events.
101	func (m *Manager) Start(ctx context.Context) {
102		for i := 0; i < m.workers; i++ {
103			m.wg.Add(1)
104			go m.worker(ctx)
105		}
106	}
107	
108	// Stop closes the queue and waits for workers to drain. Safe to call
109	// multiple times. Does NOT cancel in-flight HTTP requests — the http.Client
```

```go
package tui

import (
	"context"
	"testing"

	"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/i18n"
	"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store/storetest"
)

func TestLocaleOf_NilUserFallsBackToDefault(t *testing.T) {
	if got := localeOf(Deps{}); got != i18n.Default {
		t.Errorf("localeOf(empty Deps) = %q, want Default %q", got, i18n.Default)
	}
}

func TestLocaleOf_HonoursUserLocale(t *testing.T) {
	st := storetest.New(t)
	u := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
	// Default at create-time is zh-TW (migration 0010).
	if got := localeOf(Deps{User: u}); got != i18n.LocaleZHTW {
		t.Errorf("default = %q, want zh-TW", got)
	}
	if err := st.Users().SetLocale(context.Background(), u.ID, "en"); err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("SetLocale: %v", err)
	}
	fresh, _ := st.Users().GetByID(context.Background(), u.ID)
	if got := localeOf(Deps{User: fresh}); got != i18n.LocaleEN {
		t.Errorf("after SetLocale(en) = %q, want en", got)
	}
}

func TestLocaleOf_NormalisesUnknownStored(t *testing.T) {
	// Simulate a stale row that names a locale we no longer recognise
	// (could happen after a future "ja" support is removed). Falls back
	// to Default rather than rendering «key» everywhere.
	st := storetest.New(t)
	u := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
	if err := st.Users().SetLocale(context.Background(), u.ID, "zh-CN"); err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("SetLocale: %v", err)
	}
	fresh, _ := st.Users().GetByID(context.Background(), u.ID)
	if got := localeOf(Deps{User: fresh}); got != i18n.Default {
		t.Errorf("localeOf with unknown stored locale = %q, want Default", got)
	}
}

func TestRecipientLocale_LooksUpFromStore(t *testing.T) {
	st := storetest.New(t)
	alice := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
	bob := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "bob", "")
	if err := st.Users().SetLocale(context.Background(), bob.ID, "en"); err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("SetLocale: %v", err)
	}

	// alice is the sender (zh-TW); recipientLocale targets bob's id and
	// returns bob's stored locale, regardless of alice's setting. This is
	// the contract that lets a webhook notification render in the
	// recipient's preferred language even when the trigger event came
	// from another user.
	deps := Deps{Store: st, User: alice}
	if got := recipientLocale(deps, bob.ID); got != i18n.LocaleEN {
		t.Errorf("recipientLocale(bob.ID) = %q, want en", got)
	}
}

func TestRecipientLocale_FallsBackOnLookupError(t *testing.T) {
	// Nil Store → no DB to query; recipientLocale must not panic.
	if got := recipientLocale(Deps{}, 999); got != i18n.Default {
		t.Errorf("recipientLocale(nil store) = %q, want Default", got)
	}
	// Non-existent user id → store returns ErrUserNotFound; falls back.
	st := storetest.New(t)
	if got := recipientLocale(Deps{Store: st}, 999999); got != i18n.Default {
		t.Errorf("recipientLocale(missing user) = %q, want Default", got)
	}
}
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-07 02:34:17Z)**_

老實說：**目前沒做這個 knob**。i18n 是 per-user 的（`users.locale` column + 設定畫面），server 全域語言只剩這幾個面向硬編在 `i18n.Default = LocaleZHTW`：

1. **註冊畫面、首次登入改密碼畫面**（`deps.User == nil` 時）
2. **新建用戶的預設值**（migration `DEFAULT 'zh-TW'`）
3. **「無法 normalize 的 locale」的 fallback 語言**

要解決你的 workflow，有三條路，給你挑：

| 方案 | 改的地方 | 用法 |
|---|---|---|
| **(A) 什麼都不改** | 0 | 每個帳號自己進 `個人設定 → 語言` 切一次（持久），但 register/首次登入畫面永遠 zh-TW |
| **(B) 加 `BBS_LOCALE` env var** | `i18n.Default` 改 var + main.go 讀 env | `BBS_LOCALE=en make watch` |
| **(C) 加 `-locale en` flag** | 同上但讀 flag | `make watch ARGS="-locale en"`（需要改 Makefile 也接 ARGS） |

我傾向 **(B)**：對 `make watch` 工作流最無痛、不用動 Makefile，環境變數本來就是 charm 系列工具的常見約定。實作大概這樣：

```go
// internal/i18n/i18n.go
var Default Locale = LocaleZHTW   // 從 const 改成 var

func SetDefault(loc Locale) {     // 新增
    if Valid(string(loc)) { Default = loc }
}

// cmd/sshbbs/main.go
if v := os.Getenv("BBS_LOCALE"); v != "" {
    i18n.SetDefault(i18n.Normalize(v))
}
```

要的話我直接做（小 patch，幾行 + 一個 test），順便寫進 README/`make watch` 提示。要選 B 還是 C？或者你想先用 (A) 看夠不夠？

```text
1	package main
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"errors"
6		"flag"
7		"log"
8		"os"
9		"os/signal"
10		"strings"
11		"syscall"
12		"time"
13	
14		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
15		"github.com/charmbracelet/ssh"
16	
17		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/auth"
18		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/chat"
19		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/notify"
20		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/seed"
21		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/server"
22		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
23		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/version"
24	)
25	
26	func main() {
27		// Subcommand dispatch: anything that isn't a flag is treated as a
28		// subcommand. Today only `import` exists, but the shape leaves room
29		// for future ops tools (e.g. `export`, `dump`).
30		if len(os.Args) >= 2 && !strings.HasPrefix(os.Args[1], "-") {
31			switch os.Args[1] {
32			case "import":
33				os.Exit(runImport(os.Args[2:]))
34			default:
35				log.Fatalf("unknown subcommand: %s", os.Args[1])
36			}
37		}
38	
39		addr := flag.String("addr", ":2222", "SSH listen address")
40		dbPath := flag.String("db", "data/bbs.db", "SQLite database path")
41		hostkey := flag.String("hostkey", ".ssh/host_ed25519", "SSH host key path")
42		adminPassword := flag.String("admin-password", "",
43			"override admin password on first seed; empty uses the baked default 'admin' with must_change_password=1")
44		flag.Parse()
45	
46		st, err := store.Open(*dbPath)
47		if err != nil {
48			log.Fatalf("store.Open: %v", err)
49		}
50		defer st.Close()
51		if err := st.Boards().SeedDefaults(context.Background()); err != nil {
52			log.Fatalf("seed boards: %v", err)
53		}
54		if err := auth.SeedSystemAccounts(context.Background(), st, auth.SeedOpts{
55			AdminPassword: *adminPassword,
56		}); err != nil {
57			log.Fatalf("seed system accounts: %v", err)
58		}
59		if err := seed.Articles(context.Background(), st, auth.ReservedUsernameAdmin); err != nil {
60			log.Fatalf("seed articles: %v", err)
61		}
62		if err := seed.Banners(context.Background(), st, auth.ReservedUsernameAdmin); err != nil {
63			log.Fatalf("seed banners: %v", err)
64		}
65		log.Printf("storage ready at %s", *dbPath)
66	
67		broker := chat.NewBroker()
68	
69		notifyMgr := notify.New(st, broker)
70	
71		srv, err := server.New(server.Config{Addr: *addr, HostKey: *hostkey}, st, broker, notifyMgr)
72		if err != nil {
73			log.Fatalf("server.New: %v", err)
74		}
75	
76		ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
77		defer stop()
78		notifyMgr.Start(ctx)
79		defer notifyMgr.Stop()
80	
81		errCh := make(chan error, 1)
82		go func() {
83			log.Printf("sshbbs %s listening on %s", version.Version, *addr)
84			errCh <- srv.ListenAndServe()
85		}()
86	
87		select {
88		case err := <-errCh:
89			if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, ssh.ErrServerClosed) {
90				log.Fatalf("listen: %v", err)
91			}
92		case <-ctx.Done():
93			log.Println("shutdown signal received")
94			shutdown(srv, broker)
95		}
96	}
97	
98	// shutdown closes the listener (refuses new connections), then asks every
99	// live bubbletea program to quit, then closes the SSH server hard. The DB
100	// closes on the deferred st.Close() in main.
101	func shutdown(srv *ssh.Server, broker *chat.Broker) {
102		const drainTimeout = 3 * time.Second
103	
104		// 1. Stop accepting new connections.
105		listenerCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), drainTimeout)
106		defer cancel()
107		if err := srv.Shutdown(listenerCtx); err != nil {
108			log.Printf("server.Shutdown: %v", err)
109		}
110	
111		// 2. Tell every active session to quit.
112		sessions := broker.SessionsSnapshot()
113		if len(sessions) == 0 {
114			return
115		}
116		log.Printf("draining %d active session(s)", len(sessions))
117		for _, s := range sessions {
118			s.Program.Send(tea.Quit())
119		}
120	
121		// 3. Give them a moment to flush their final view, then force-close.
122		timer := time.NewTimer(drainTimeout)
123		defer timer.Stop()
124		for {
125			if len(broker.SessionsSnapshot()) == 0 {
126				log.Println("all sessions drained")
127				return
128			}
129			select {
130			case <-timer.C:
131				log.Printf("drain timeout; %d session(s) still attached", len(broker.SessionsSnapshot()))
132				return
133			case <-time.After(100 * time.Millisecond):
134			}
135		}
136	}
137
```

```bash
git add cmd/sshbbs/main.go internal/auth/auth.go internal/auth/auth_test.go internal/i18n/i18n.go internal/i18n/i18n_test.go && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
i18n: -locale flag + BBS_LOCALE env for server-wide default locale

Operators can now flip the server-wide default with either:

    BBS_LOCALE=en make watch          # env var
    go run ./cmd/sshbbs -locale=en    # CLI flag (overrides env)

The flag's default reads from BBS_LOCALE so the env path needs no
Makefile change. Invalid values fail-fast at startup with a clear
error rather than silently falling back. Default unchanged (zh-TW)
when neither is set; the active value is logged on boot.

Affects:
- pre-login screens (register / first-login password change) where
  deps.User is nil and i18n.Default is the only source of truth
- newly-registered accounts: auth.Register now stamps the server
  default onto users.locale via SetLocale, so a non-Chinese operator
  doesn't have to tell every fresh signup to flip the setting.
  Existing users keep their stored choice; system seed accounts still
  use the migration's column DEFAULT 'zh-TW'.
- fallback chain when a key is missing in another locale's table

i18n.Default went from const → var; SetDefault is the single mutation
point and silently ignores unknown locales (forward-compat for a
future ja/ko addition where a stale BBS_LOCALE shouldn't crash boot).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git log --oneline -4
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-07 07:04:39Z)**_

完成。現在你有三條路：

```bash
make watch                              # zh-TW (預設)
BBS_LOCALE=en make watch                # env var
go run ./cmd/sshbbs -locale=en ...      # flag (蓋過 env)
```

**4th commit 落地**：
```
385a80b i18n: -locale flag + BBS_LOCALE env for server-wide default locale
```

驗證過的行為：
- `make watch` 啟動印 `default locale: zh-TW`（沒設定）
- `BBS_LOCALE=en` 印 `default locale: en`
- `-locale=en` 印 `default locale: en`，且**蓋過** env（用 `BBS_LOCALE=zh-TW -locale=en` 仍是 en）
- `-locale=fr` 啟動失敗：`invalid -locale / BBS_LOCALE "fr": must be one of zh-TW, en` — 不會靜默 fallback

**影響範圍**：
- Register 畫面 / 首次改密碼畫面（`deps.User == nil` 的場景）
- **新註冊用戶**會繼承 server default：`auth.Register` 在 `Create` 後加一道 `SetLocale(i18n.Default)`，所以英文 operator 不用告訴每個 alice/bob 自己去切設定
- 舊用戶 `users.locale` 不動；guest/admin 系統帳號也不動（用 migration column default 'zh-TW'）
- `i18n.Default` 從 `const` 改 `var`，新增 `SetDefault()`（無效 locale 靜默忽略，避免 BBS_LOCALE typo 弄掛 prod）

**測試新增**：
- `i18n.TestSetDefault`：合法 locale 改變、非法忽略
- `auth.TestRegister_InheritsServerDefaultLocale`：開 `LocaleEN` 後註冊 alice，DB 與 in-memory User 兩邊都是 `en`
- `auth.TestRegister_Success` 順手檢查 Locale == server Default

`make test-race` 全綠（含 4 commit 的所有路徑）。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-07 07:28:29Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-07 07:28:41Z)**_

對，完全正確。釐清一下哪些事情是 server-wide 哪些是 per-user：

**`-locale` / `BBS_LOCALE` 只影響 3 件事：**

1. **Pre-login 畫面** — register、首次登入改密碼這些 `deps.User == nil` 的場景沒人能查 locale，只能用 `i18n.Default`
2. **新註冊用戶的初始 locale** — `auth.Register` 在 `Create` 後 stamp 上 `i18n.Default`（`internal/auth/auth.go:127`），所以英文 operator 開的站新人預設就是 en
3. **Fallback 鏈** — 某 key 在 en 表沒填、又沒法查到 user locale 時的最終兜底

**完全不碰：**
- ❌ 既有用戶的 `users.locale` — 保留他們 DB 裡存的選擇
- ❌ 系統帳號 (`admin` / `guest`) 的 locale — 走 migration column DEFAULT 'zh-TW'，不被 server flag 改寫
- ❌ 個人設定 → 語言 那個畫面 — 一直在、永遠可以自切

**Per-user 自定義完全保留：**
- 任何登入後的 user 進 `個人設定 → 語言 (Language)` 都能切 zh-TW ↔ en
- `screen_locale_settings.go` 直接寫 `users.locale` 並 in-place refresh `*deps.User`，當下生效
- 儲存後跨重啟、跨 `make watch` 都記得

**實例：英文 operator 開站**
```
BBS_LOCALE=en make watch        # server default = en
ssh new@localhost -p 2222       # alice 註冊 → users.locale='en' (繼承 default)
# alice 進個人設定 → 語言，切到 zh-TW，按 Ctrl+S
# 從此 alice 永遠是 zh-TW，即使 server 是 en
ssh new@localhost -p 2222       # bob 註冊 → users.locale='en' (新人仍繼承 default)
```

所以 server default 只是「出生時的預設值」+「沒身份時的預設值」，個人選擇永遠有最高優先權。
